Description:

Our focus is on long-term partnerships, transparent communication, and efficient production processes that support sustainable brand growth.

Name: Paul Mitchell the School St. Louis
Description:
Paul Mitchell the School St Louis is one of 107 Paul Mitchell Schools nationwide which provide professional cosmetology training covering the art, business, and a Be Nice (or Else!) culture in the health and beauty industry.  

Established 30 years ago, the Paul Mitchell network is nearly 100,000 salons strong and in 81 countries worldwide, and every professional hairdresser knows the Paul Mitchell name. Now, with the arrival of Paul Mitchell beauty schools, we’ve taken the world of cosmetology education by storm.

For over 20 years, the staffs at Paul Mitchell beauty schools have built strong working relationships with salons around the world. Prospective employers recognize our commitment to quality and our reputation for innovation and excellence, and Paul Mitchell–trained hair designers work in virtually every corner of the world.

Paul Mitchell beauty schools were designed to teach you the skills you’ll need, inspire you to explore your passion and creativity, and help you learn the business that will make your career in the beauty industry fun and rewarding. Come join us today and say YES to your future!

Name: Katarina Maravich Hair Colourist
Description:
Rođena 1985. godine u Beogradu, završila Školu za negu lepote 2003. godine. Po završetku škole odmah počinje sa samostalim radom u salonu. 2010. godine odlučuje da se posveti i usavršava samo iz oblasti kolora i tada počinje da posećuje razne seminare, obuke, predavanja.

Svoj rad je započela sa Revlon preparatima. Nakon nekog vremena i posle edukacija van zemlje, prva je u našoj zemlji koja je otpočela rad sa Olapleksom u saradnji sa generalnim uvoznikom i distributerom VSD Trade.

“Drago mi je što sam uspela da u našoj zemlji realizujem svoju ideju na kojoj sam radila jako dugo, a to je salon koji će biti specijalizovan samo za kolorizacije! Svuda u svetu postoje saloni u kojima rade isključivo KOLORISTI koji ulažu svoje vreme i novac samo u usavršavanje ove oblasti! Smatram da kada se bazirate i usavršavate samo jednu sferu vašeg posla, taj deo ćete raditi perfektno, a kada se bazirate na više stvari, onda sve radite površno!”

“Svakoga dana se susrećem sa novim izazovima. U tome i vidim draž ovog posla. Talenat je prepoznati MAKSIMUM koji se može uraditi na određenom tipu kose, a znanje je ono što nas dovodi do REZULTATA. Svoj posao radim sa puno ljubavi i uživam u svakom danu koji provedem u salonu sa svojim klijentima.”

“Lako je nijansirati i kolorisati zdravu kosu koja ima veliki prag izdržljivosti. Treba se snaći kada vam dođe klijent koja ima hemijsko šišanje i stepen oštećenja 95%. U toj opciji nemate puno izbora OSIM da imate veliko iskustvo i znanje.”

Name: Wallah Habibi Attar & Perfume
Description:
**WALLAH HABIBI ATTAR & PERFUME: A Journey Through Fragrance**

Welcome to Wallah Habibi Attar & Perfume, your ultimate destination for exquisite scents that embody tradition and luxury. Our collection features a diverse range of high-quality oud, traditional attars, and premium replicas of top designer fragrances, ensuring a sensory experience that caters to every preference.

**Oud: The Essence of Luxury**

At the heart of our offerings is oud, often referred to as liquid gold. Sourced from the heart of the agarwood tree, our oud products are meticulously crafted to capture the rich, woody aroma that has captivated cultures for centuries. Whether you prefer a deep, dark oud or a lighter, more floral blend, our selections are designed to transport you to distant lands with each application.

**Traditional Attars: A Heritage of Scent**

Our traditional attars pay homage to the age-old art of fragrance crafting. Made from natural ingredients, these alcohol-free oils offer a pure and long-lasting scent experience. From the refreshing notes of jasmine and rose to the earthy hints of sandalwood and musk, each attar tells a story, connecting you to the rich cultural heritage of perfumery. Perfect for layering or wearing alone, our attars are ideal for both everyday use and special occasions.

**Top Brand Replicas: Luxury Within Reach**

For those who adore the allure of high-end designer fragrances but seek affordability, our top brand replicas are the perfect solution. Each scent is carefully formulated to mirror the essence of iconic perfumes, providing an indulgent experience without the hefty price tag. Enjoy the sophistication of your favorite luxury brands with our expertly crafted replicas, ensuring you smell fabulous for any occasion.

**Commitment to Quality**

At Wallah Habibi, we prioritize quality above all. Our fragrances are crafted with precision, using only the finest ingredients to ensure that every scent meets the highest standards.

Name: Mustaċċun Limited
Description:
In the heart of two magnificent towns, there stands a hidden gem, where the traditional and modern seamlessly blend, there is a place that stands as a testament to timeless elegance and meticulous craftsmanship. The talk of the town is all about an experience that transcends mere grooming and at its epicentre is il-Mustaċċun.

Il-Mustaċċun is no ordinary barbershop; it is a sanctuary where the essence of traditional barbering is honoured and celebrated. Every detail, from the vintage green leather chairs to the glistening straight razors, speaks of a dedication to reviving an art that has stood the test of time. Here, clients do not just come for a haircut or a shave—they come to experience the art of traditional old-school barbering. This is the extraordinary story of il-Mustaċċun.

Name: Luxury Cosmetics Pty (Ltd)
Description:
We work closely with Brand Principals and Retail Partners to understand our customers’ needs and expectations.This enables us to offer solutions and value recommendations and ultimately deliver above market growth.
We value long-term relationships and customer satisfaction above any short-term gains and thus maintain a high-level of integrity in all our dealings.
COMPANY OBJECTIVES
In support of our objectives and vision, we prioritise the following in our business:
Representing the interest of our Brand Principals
Exceeding customer expectations
Retaining the best possible employees through continued growth and development
Maintaining profitability through continuity
COMPETITIVE ADVANTAGE
A passion for cosmetics, our significant industry knowledge, and understanding of branded cosmetics allow us to provide a dedicated platform to deliver strong and sustained growth.
Our uncompromising customer orientation and belief in the importance of continued staff development make it difficult for competitors to emulate the business.CHANNELS OF DISTRIBUTION
We have enjoyed strong, long-standing relationship with major retailers for over 20 years and continue to appreciate the loyalty of our Retail Partners.
Founded in 1985, the Payot Pty Ltd  (now Luxury Cosmetics) under the ownership of Marcelle Feenstra, launched Decleor and Smashbox in South Africa and grew the brands to their current position. Smashbox was bought internationally ,LC kept it for 2 years after the Estee Lauder Purchase Internationally.Payot  SA was initially a subsidiary of Prestige Cosmetics, created to distribute the Payot brand in South Africa. The company was awarded the distribution rights for Payot, Decleor and Carita in 2000.  In 2007, Marcelle Feenstra became the sole shareholder and the company’s name change was changed to “Luxury Cosmetics”.  
The company subsequently launched the Smashbox make-up brand, Maria Galland and more recently, the Comfort Zone, Skin Regimen, Stila and fragrance brands.

Name: ECO-BELLEZAUG
Description:
We provide natural organic slime based body lotions, creams and moisturizing soap to treat Acne and nourishes the skin.

Eco-Belleza is a visionary initiative that envisions a world where beauty is synonymous with sustainability. Our project centers on creating and promoting natural, organic skincare solutions while fostering community empowerment and environmental well-being. At its core, Eco-Belleza seeks to redefine beauty practices, championing the use of unique, natural ingredients like snail slime and indigenous herbs.

Our vision goes beyond skincare; it embraces a holistic approach to beauty that uplifts local communities. We empower farmers through sustainable agriculture practices, provide entrepreneurial opportunities, and offer digital education on skincare and eco-conscious living through our Digital Learning Center.

As we cultivate beauty naturally, we aim to become a global leader in the sustainable beauty industry. Our commitment extends to the self-sustainability of our business, contributing positively to local economies, and inspiring a shift towards eco-friendly practices worldwide.

Eco-Belleza isn't just about skincare; it's a movement towards a more beautiful, sustainable, and interconnected world—one where beauty is not only skin deep but extends to the very heart of empowered communities and a healthier planet.

Name: Brand Amrit Kaur
Description:
We at ''BRAND AMRIT KAUR'' are collaborating with cosmetics firms and fashion stylists.

We provide internationally recognized qualifications for proficiency in professional make-up application techniques. 

What makes our qualifications special? 
Our qualifications are aimed specifically at make-up application for make-up artists – they are not vague ‘beauty’ qualifications for therapists or beauticians. We have a modern approach with realistic and contemporary criteria that are relevant to today’s make-up industry. 

Who do we serve? 
We provide an industry benchmark for make-up artists and those who want to employ make-up artists. To hold a qualification, you must first have achieved a high level of skill in your field, thereby a potential employer or agent can be assured of your talent and credentials. For the qualified make-up artist, we offer a referral resource – simply agree to have an email link from our site and potential employers can reach you and you can follow up jobs that are posted on the Jobs board.

Who uses our qualifications? 
Most fashion make-up house who employ counter staff would require a recognized independent qualification to show that the employee has the basic level of understanding in hygiene, application and client care.

Name: Alpha Male Barber Shop
Description:
Alpha Male Barber Shop est une entreprise pour les petits enfants, les jeunes hommes et les hommes adultes qui veulent une coiffure professionnelle de qualité à moindre coût.

Alpha Male Barber Shop est un Salon de coiffure, mais qui différemment des services concurrents, permet de faire la coiffure étape par étape selon des normes grâce au professionnalisme, la qualité et le temps du service. 

En effet, au Sénégal, l’environnement concurrentiel dans ce métier, se modifie en profondeur, avec récemment, le développement des activités de coiffure « hors salon ». Ces évolutions sont de nature à questionner les entreprises du secteur tant en matière d’attractivité, de cohérence, de lisibilité, de qualité de leur offre mais aussi en matière de la politique tarifaire. 

Pour résoudre ce problème, Alpha Male Barber Shop est venu, aider la population à satisfaire leurs besoins de coiffure par des coiffures professionnelles de qualité, à moindre coût et une disponibilité totale.

Notre vision

Au Bar à Lissage, nous avons choisi d’ouvrir un espace dédié à la beauté du cheveu avec une idée simple : offrir aux femmes du Gabon des soins innovants, sûrs et respectueux.  
Nous travaillons exclusivement avec des produits certifiés, que nous sélectionnons auprès de fournisseurs fiables basés en France. Tous nos soins sont garantis sans formol et sans acide glycolique, pour préserver la santé des cheveux et du cuir chevelu.  
Parce que la coiffure évolue en permanence, nous ramenons tous les six mois de nouveaux produits à la pointe de la technologie. Nous nous formons aussi régulièrement aux dernières techniques de lissage, afin que chaque cliente bénéficie de ce qu’il y a de mieux.  
Notre vision est de nous installer durablement au Gabon, d’y grandir, et de faire rayonner notre notoriété par la qualité de notre travail, mais aussi par notre disponibilité, notre réactivité et notre chaleur humaine.  
Au Bar à Lissage, nous croyons que prendre soin de ses cheveux, c’est aussi prendre soin de soi.

Ihre Zufriedenheit steht für uns an erster Stelle. Deshalb legen wir großen Wert auf eine persönliche Beratung, um Ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse und Wünsche zu verstehen. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihnen ein maßgeschneidertes Erlebnis zu bieten, das Ihre Erwartungen übertrifft.

Name: BARBARIAN COSMETICS
Description:
Welcome to Barbarian Barber Cosmetics & Furniture, a leading manufacturer of professional barber and salon products. With our roots in Turkiye, we have expanded our presence globally, delivering high-quality barber cosmetics and salon & barber furniture to professionals worldwide.

Our journey started with a commitment to excellence, crafting premium-grade hair and grooming products that meet the highest industry standards. Over the years, we have successfully established ourselves across Europe and the Gulf countries, earning the trust of barbers and salons with our superior product range and dedication to innovation.

As a company driven by quality and customer satisfaction, we continuously evolve to meet the needs of professionals who seek top-tier solutions for their craft. Our expansion into the United Kingdom with a dedicated warehouse has strengthened our logistics and distribution network, ensuring fast and efficient service across the region.

Now, we are proud to announce our entry into the United States market with our brand-new warehouse in Florida. This marks a significant milestone in our journey, allowing us to bring our expertise and premium product offerings to the thriving barber and salon industry in North America. From our U.S. warehouse, we also serve customers in Canada and Latin American countries, ensuring fast delivery and exceptional service across the region.

At Barbarian, we are more than just a brand; we are a community built on passion, precision, and professionalism. Whether you are looking for cutting-edge barber cosmetics or high-quality salon and barber furniture, we are here to provide you with the best solutions to elevate your business.

Join us as we continue to shape the future of the barbering and salon industry worldwide!

Name: Winc Cosmetics
Description:
At Winc Cosmetics, we specialize in providing makeup, hair, and costume design services tailored exclusively for film productions and media houses. With years of expertise in the industry, we understand the unique demands of the film world and are dedicated to bringing your vision to life.

Our Services:

1. Makeup Design: 
 From subtle enhancements to avant-garde transformations, including special effects makeup, our professional makeup artists and hair stylists/ barbers have the skills and creativity to execute any look your project demands. 

2. Costume Design/Styling:
Our wardrobe stylists are experts at creating captivating and authentic costumes that enhance the storytelling of your film. From conceptualization to execution, we collaborate closely with directors and production teams to ensure every detail is perfect.

3. Look Book Design:
Need help visualizing the overall style and feel of your project? Our design team can create comprehensive look books that capture the essence of your vision, providing a roadmap for hair, makeup, and wardrobe throughout production.

Why Choose Winc?

Professionalism: We pride ourselves on our professionalism and reliability. Unlike individual freelancers, we operate as a cohesive team, ensuring that your project is never delayed or compromised by personal issues.

Expertise: Our staff are all professionally trained in their respective fields, with years of experience working specifically within the film industry. You can trust us to deliver exceptional results every time.

Collaborative Approach: We believe in collaboration and communication every step of the way. We work closely with directors, producers, and other creative professionals to bring your vision to fruition, while also offering our own expertise and creative input.

Quality Assurance: You can always expect the highest quality of service. We use only the best tools and techniques to ensure that your film's makeup,hair and costumes look stunning on screen.

Spa de Luxo, logística de um total de sete cursos ministrados pelo País e linha de produtos com mais de 150 SKUs formam o tripé que atualmente a denominam grupo Spa Renata França.

Em 2022, o Método Renata França ultrapassou o total 50 países, onde é fielmente replicado por meio das mãos de mais de 13 mil terapeutas habilitados nas técnicas criadas por Renata. O feito tornou a massagem brasileira um sinônimo de massagem de resultado imediato em todo mundo. Atualmente, são sete protocolos, dos quais três passaram a ser ministrados, in loco, em dez países, além do Brasil: Espanha, França, Inglaterra, Itália, Portugal, Suíça, Japão e Estados Unidos. Bélgica e Israel entraram para o rol em 2023.

Name: Green Heads
Description:
Sedan 2016 har Green Heads byggt ett starkt community inom grön hårvård genom att erbjuda personliga och hållbara salongsupplevelser.

Det höga förtroendet har ökat efterfrågan inom gröna hårvårdsprodukter, en marknad där Green Heads valt att expandera sina produktserier. Genom en innovativ kombination av naturliga och hållbara ingrediensval parat med fokus på maximalt aktiva ämnen och resultatorienterad funktion har Green Heads tagit ett stort kliv mot att förverkliga visionen: en värld där all hårvård är grön hårvård. Målet är att bidra till en mer hållbar värld där skönhet, hälsa och miljö är lika viktiga. Detta åstadkommer vi genom att göra det enklare för människor att göra medvetna val kring sin hårvård, utan att tumma på resultatet.

Green Heads produkter består av tre olika serier: Green Heads vård- och stylingserie, Green Heads färgserie och Green Heads essentials.

Att leva ett hållbart liv handlar inte bara om att äta ekologiskt eller återvinna. Det handlar även om att ta hänsyn till vilka ämnen vi utsätter naturen och kroppen för. Därför har vi på Green Heads valt att certifiera alla våra salonger och produkter med Grön Salong, som validerar att verksamheten är 100% fri från toxiska ämnen. Målet att arbeta hållbart och med stort hjärta har också gjort att alla Green Heads egna produkter även är certifierade av Peta, som garanterar att alla produkter veganska och cruelty-free.

Doch damit nicht genug. SCHADSTOFFFREI

Unsere Technik ist also nicht nur effektiv, sondern auch schadstofffrei und schonend für die Kopfhaut.

ABSOLUT
NATÜRLICHER LOOK
Mit unserer SIMPLIE Technik bieten wir eine Methode der Haarverlängerung und -verdichtung an, die einen absolut natürlichen Look garantiert. Durch unsere unsichtbaren Verbindungsstellen und die gleichmäßig fallenden SIMPLIE Wefts bleibt die Haarverlängerung oder -verdichtung nahezu unsichtbar und ermöglicht weiterhin verschiedene Frisuren wie Zöpfe oder Hochsteckfrisuren.
DIE SIMPLIE TECHNIK

Name: Zobrist Intercoiffure
Description:
Zobrist Intercoiffure - Ein Familienunternehmen in 5. Generation, das sich um seine Mitarbeiter und Kunden kümmert. Bei uns dreht sich alles um die Schönheit der Haare und das Wohlbefinden unserer Gäste. Mit einer reichen Tradition und langjähriger Erfahrung sind wir stolz darauf, ein etabliertes Coiffeurgeschäft zu sein, das sich stets weiterentwickelt und den modernen Trends folgt.

Unser Hauptaugenmerk liegt auf unseren Mitarbeitern, die das Herzstück unseres Unternehmens bilden. Wir schätzen ihr Talent, ihre Leidenschaft und ihren Ehrgeiz. Durch regelmässige Schulungen und Weiterbildungen stellen wir sicher, dass sie stets auf dem neuesten Stand der Techniken und Trends sind. Dies ermöglicht es ihnen, ihre Kreativität und ihr handwerkliches Können voll auszuleben und unseren Kunden erstklassige Dienstleistungen anzubieten.

Die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden stehen bei uns an erster Stelle. Wir sind bestrebt, eine angenehme und entspannte Atmosphäre zu schaffen, in der sie sich wohlfühlen und den Alltagsstress hinter sich lassen können. Unser Team nimmt sich die Zeit, auf individuelle Wünsche einzugehen und eine masgeschneiderte Beratung anzubieten. Wir möchten, dass jeder Kunde das Salonerlebnis geniesst und mit einem Lächeln auf dem Gesicht den Salon verlässt.

Bei Zobrist Intercoiffure bieten wir unseren Mitarbeitern und Kunden viel Freiraum, den schönen Beruf des Coiffeurs auszuleben. Wir glauben daran, dass die Arbeit im Coiffeurgeschäft eine kreative Leidenschaft ist, die Raum für persönlichen Ausdruck und Innovation lässt. Unsere Mitarbeiter können ihrer Kreativität freien Lauf lassen und ihre individuellen Fähigkeiten entwickeln. Gleichzeitig ermöglichen wir unseren Kunden, ihre Persönlichkeit durch ihre Frisur zum Ausdruck zu bringen und sich selbstbewusst zu fühlen.

Wir sind stolz darauf, ein Coiffeurgeschäft zu sein, das sich über fünf Generationen hinweg bewährt hat.

Name: Salon Bern
Description:
Wunderschönes langes Haar ist der Traum vieler Frauen. Leider sind nicht alle von Natur aus mit langen oder dichten Haaren gesegnet. Aus diesem Grund haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, diesen Frauen trotz der fehlenden Grundvoraussetzungen zu Ihrer Traummähne und damit oft auch zu mehr Lebensqualität zu verhelfen. Seit 2001 sind wir nun bereits auf das Einarbeiten von Echthaar-Extensions spezialisiert.

Durch die hohe Nachfrage gibt es in diesem Segment mittlerweile leider sehr große Qualitätsunterschiede. Einige Hersteller verwenden sogar Silikone, um schlechte Haarqualität zu überdecken. Auf den ersten Blick nicht erkennbar, waschen sich diese während der Tragezeit ab und es kommt zu Verklettungen und Verfilzungen der Haare. Daher ist es sehr wichtig, den Salon mit Bedacht auszuwählen und sich nur in geschulte, erfahrene Hände zu begeben.

Dank des Vertrauens unserer Kunden, die von uns ausschließlich die beste Haarqualität erhalten, dürfen wir uns seit 2012 als deutschlandweit führend auf diesem Gebiet bezeichnen. Wenn Sie also auf der Suche nach einem Friseur in Krefeld, Düsseldorf und NRW sind, der nicht nur die klassischen Friseur-Serviceleistungen anbietet, sondern auch professionell mit Extensions arbeitet, dann sind Sie bei uns im Salon genau richtig.

Salon Bern – Ihr Friseursalon mit Herz, Leidenschaft & dem Anspruch an höchste Qualität!

Lernen Sie uns kennen:

Salon Bern
Inhaberin  Sabine Bern
Heyenbaumstrasse 50

Name: Sanrizz Salons
Description:
Renowned and respected worldwide as a driving force in the hairdressing profession, Sanrizz has been at the forefront of British Hairdressing and Education for more than 40 years.

Over the years Sanrizz has developed a name for its precision cutting, inventive colouring and creative hairdressing. With a long history in education, it has always been part of the Sanrizz philosophy to pass on knowledge and experiences.

The Sanrizz Artistic Team regularly travels around the world appearing in hair shows and seminars, sharing their latest work. The Team is led by Founder & Director - Tony Rizzo, International Creative Director - Leonardo Rizzo, and Education Director - Sharon Cox.

In the UK Sanrizz run a wide range of courses for all levels of hairdressing, from Beginner to Advanced, with a key emphasis on the importance of hands-on and face-to-face learning as well as continual education programmes that challenge and motivate the hairdresser to keep refining and improving their current skillset.

Sanrizz is equally revered for strong, bold imagery. Photographic collections by the Sanrizz Artistic Team continually appear in hairdressing magazines across the globe.

As a hairdressing business Sanrizz has grown steadily over the years and formed a strong presence and foundation in three key locations - Sanrizz Brunswick, Sanrizz St Albans and Sanrizz Guildford.

Sanrizz comprises of 3 sensory areas: the Salon, Academy, and Studio. These areas offer a hub of creativity, sharing the Sanrizz mechanics and artistry of hairdressing. 

Undoubtedly Sanrizz has a winning Team. Winners and Finalists of many awards within the Hairdressing Industry, Sanrizz is highly regarded for its aspirational and perfectly executed hairstyling.

I am the lead Makeup Artist (MUA) for a renowned, prestigious photographer at Studio 57 Photography.  I can help you achieve both a beautiful face and refer you to an amazing photographer to capture the moment.

Services Provided:

I cater to bridal parties, photoshoot sessions, and special events of all kinds.  As a licensed Esthetician, I also offer full-body waxing services.

Customer Service Guarantee:

I value customer service and treat my clients with the upmost respect and compassion.  I am prompt, efficient, and trustworthy.  I respect your time and try my best to accomplish your desired look.  We can discuss your look in full detail.  Feel free to express yourself!  My makeup sessions are not about me; they are all about pleasing YOU – the most important component of my business.

Name: Health Line Cosmetics
Description:
Η Health Line Cosmetics ιδρύθηκε το 1996 στην Αθήνα με ”ευγενή” στόχο που ήταν και παραμένει, την προσφορά μεθόδων, τεχνικών και προϊόντων που να βοηθούν τους συνεργάτες μας Επαγγελματίες στον  χώρο της Αισθητικής, της Υγείας και της Ευεξίας, σε συνεχή Επαγγελματική ανέλιξη και πληρότητα Επιστημονικής κατάρτισης.

Από την πρώτη ημέρα της 26ετούς πορείας μας, αντιπροσωπεύουμε τον Γερμανικό οίκο Dr. RIMPLER cosmetics, επικουρούμενοι από την Επιστημονική του γνώση, τις νέες τεχνολογίες, την αξιοπιστία και γενικά την πληρότητα που διαθέτει σε όλους τους σχετικούς τομείς. Τον Σεπτέμβριο του 2011 η εξελικτική πορεία της Health Line Cosmetics, μας οδήγησε στην αποκλειστική αντιπροσώπευση του Γαλλικού οίκου Isabelle Lancray Paris με παγκόσμιες διακρίσεις και βραβεύσεις στην Κοσμητική Νανοτεχνολογία και Βιομιμητική.

Οι νέες πρωτότυπες μέθοδοι και τα πρωτοποριακά προϊόντα, ήταν τα κριτήρια επιλογής μας το 2018, για την μοναδική σε παγκόσμιο επίπεδο ολοκληρωμένη μέθοδο Psychodynamic Body treatment, γνωστή και ως METODO Giovanna Certo έτσι ώστε από το 2019 γινόμαστε η μοναδική εκτός Ιταλίας χώρα στον κόσμο, που η κ. Certo εμπιστεύεται την μέθοδό της, τα προϊόντα της αλλά και την τεχνογνωσία της.

Συνεχίζοντας την αναζήτησή μας, από τις αρχές του 2020 είμαστε οι αποκλειστικοί αντιπρόσωποι ενός ακόμα Γερμανικού οίκου, του ALEX COSMETIC, με συνθέσεις προϊόντων βασισμένες στις νεότερες αρχές και την Επιστημονική γνώση της Κοσμετολογίας, της Φαρμακολογίας, της Βοτανικής και της Φυτολογίας.

Παράλληλα γνωρίζοντας τους στόχους και τους ορίζοντες της Ιατρικής Αισθητικής και την αλματώδη ανάπτυξή της στην χώρα μας, από τα μέσα του 2020 συνεργαζόμαστε με την μεγαλύτερη ίσως, σε πανευρωπαϊκό επίπεδο Εταιρεία έρευνας, ανάπτυξης, καινοτομίας και παρασκευής φαρμακευτικών καλλυντικών την Ιταλική MESOTECH και συνεχίζουμε…

Description:

Dit kan voor mensen zijn zonder vaste woon- of verblijfplaats, mensen met financiële uitdagingen of mensen die plots voor een onvoorziene impactvolle situatie staan.

De Straatkapper brengt dit in praktijk door mensen kosteloos te knippen en zo een bijdrage te leveren aan waardigheid, hoop en liefde voor de medemens. Daarnaast wil De Straatkapper door middel van ‘straatverhalen’ via diverse (sociale) mediakanalen een positieve impact maken in Nederland.

LaCasaMia Beauty is de vertegenwoordiger van het Zweedse biologische huidverzorgingsmerk MARIA ÅKERBERG in Nederland en België. Wij zijn onder andere verantwoordelijk voor het begeleiden en coachen van de MÅ professionals en het geven van de officiële trainingen en cursussen van MARIA ÅKERBERG aan Nederlandse en Belgische professionals.

MARIA ÅKERBERG is van mening dat iedereen recht heeft op huidverzorging die afgestemd is op het eigen huidtype. De producten zijn daarom alleen verkrijgbaar bij opgeleide resellers die professioneel en persoonlijk advies kunnen geven.

Werelwijd zijn er ongeveer 1200 MÅ resellers, voornamelijk in Scandinavië. In Nederland werd het merk geïntroduceerd in 2014 en het aantal MÅ professionals in deze regio dat met het merk werkt stijgt voortdurend.

Schoonheidsspecialisten, spa-en wellnessresorts, masseurs, pedicures en kappers maken dankbaar gebruik van de producten en behandelingen van MARIA ÅKERBERG. Nederlandse beautyprofessionals die graag met het merk willen werken, kunnen terecht bij de Zweeds-Nederlandse Maria Kroezen-Åkersten van LaCasaMia Beauty in Emmen.

Our story starts in 2015. Built on our belief that everyone deserves to feel good while looking in the mirror, AMIRO was founded with a dream to make the at-home skincare experience accessible and effective.

A Elite Man Studio é muito mais do que uma barbearia. É um verdadeiro espaço de cuidado e estilo dedicado ao homem moderno. Com um ambiente sofisticado, atendimento personalizado e profissionais altamente qualificados, oferecemos uma experiência completa que vai muito além do simples corte de cabelo.

Nosso portfólio de serviços inclui corte de cabelo, barba tradicional e desenhada, limpeza de pele e tratamentos voltados para o bem-estar e autoestima masculina. Trabalhamos com técnicas modernas e equipamentos de última geração, garantindo sempre um resultado impecável, alinhado às tendências e ao estilo pessoal de cada cliente.

Além dos serviços, contamos com uma linha exclusiva de produtos para cabelo e barba, cuidadosamente selecionados para proporcionar hidratação, controle e um visual sempre impecável. Desde pomadas e ceras modeladoras até óleos e balms para barba, nossos produtos ajudam você a manter o visual em dia também fora da barbearia.

Pensando em oferecer ainda mais vantagens aos nossos clientes, criamos o Plano de Assinatura Elite, que garante descontos exclusivos em serviços e produtos, além de benefícios especiais e prioridade no agendamento. Uma solução prática, econômica e inteligente para quem valoriza cuidado contínuo e atendimento premium.

Na Elite Man Studio, cada detalhe é pensado para proporcionar conforto, elegância e uma experiência única. Venha nos visitar e descubra um novo conceito em barbearia. Seu estilo, seu momento, seu estúdio.

Name: Art of Wellness
Description:
Vi er et varieret team af dygtige behandlere, der tilbyder et bredt udvalg af behandlinger indenfor personlig pleje. Vi står klar til at forkæle dig og stræber efter at skabe de bedste resultater.

I 2021 udvidede vi forretningen med et samarbejde med Regen Age Cliniv v. Tony Kristensen, og vi laver nu alle de kosmetiske behandlinger der tilbydes på markedet indenfor både filer, skin Care og Botox. Vi går meget op i produkters renhed og autencitet.

Grundlægger og ejer, Mette, har udviklet sin egen hudplejeserie, Logic SkinCare, der passer til forskellige hudtyper, og er ren forkælelse for din hud.
Derudover forhandler klinikken Dermalogica, iS Clinical, Fillerina, MBR, Radical vitaminer fra ANP (Advanced Nutrition Programme) samt mineralmakeup fra Jane Iredale og hårprodukter fra PH pure hair.

Det betyder for dig, at vi altid tager udgangspunkt i din huds behov og kan tilpasse behandlingen til dig, med de produkter der egner sig bedst til din hud og din hudtilstand. 
Vi lægger stor vægt på at alle produkter er rene, miljøvenlige, bæredygtige og ikke tilstoppende for huden. 
Vi går meget op i efteruddannelse og dygtiggørelse indenfor de forskellige fagområder, og takket være vores gode samarbejde med bl.a Dermalogica, er vi sikre på at vi konstant holdes opdateret på viden og udvikling. 
Vi glæder os til at byde dig velkommen hos Art of Wellness.

Name: Supremo Global Academy
Description:
Acerca de Supremo – Formación de Alto Nivel en Peluquería

En Supremo, no solo enseñamos peluquería, formamos artistas y emprendedores. Creemos que la peluquería es una combinación entre técnica, creatividad y visión de negocio, por lo que preparamos a nuestros alumnos para convertirse en peluqueros profesionales de primer nivel, capaces de destacar en cualquier salón o emprender con éxito su propio proyecto.

Nuestros programas de formación:

Stage Zero: Curso de iniciación a la peluquería que capacita a los alumnos para dominar cualquier tipo de cabello, desarrollar su creatividad y perfeccionar su técnica. Al finalizar, estarán preparados para trabajar en cualquier salón o montar su propio negocio.
Cursos de perfeccionamiento:
Control (5 días): Enfoque avanzado para perfeccionar técnicas.
Comprehensive (3 días): Formación intensiva para mejorar habilidades específicas.
One to One: Formación personalizada diseñada a medida según las necesidades del alumno, garantizando un aprendizaje adaptado.
Además de nuestra formación técnica, ofrecemos talleres exclusivos para los alumnos de Stage Zero, donde profundizan en áreas como colorimetría, trenzado, barbas y técnicas avanzadas. También cuentan con acceso a sesiones con peluqueros referentes del sector y formación en emprendimiento, finanzas y aspectos laborales.

Supremo no es solo una academia de peluquería, es un espacio donde los alumnos desarrollan su potencial, perfeccionan su arte y adquieren las herramientas necesarias para construir un futuro profesional sólido en el sector.

Si buscas una formación completa, enfocada en la excelencia y adaptada a las exigencias del mercado actual, en Supremo encontrarás el camino para convertir tu pasión en tu profesión.

Animée par une passion pour le monde de la beauté du regard, Simphonie choisi de s'engager dans cette aventure.

Guidée par une passion pour les extensions et assoiffée de connaissance, Elle a parcouru le globe (Russie, Canada, Turquie, France) pour acquérir une expertise variée en matière de méthodes d'application d'extensions, dans le but de transmettre ses connaissances à ses élèves.

Aujourd'hui, sa volonté de partager cette passion s'est également étendue au domaine de la beauté des ongles, et nous offrons désormais des formations complètes et de haute qualité en matière d'extensions de cils et de soins des ongles. Cette qualité se manifeste dans le succès des élèves formés.

L'objectif de l'académie Simphonie Cils est de former, conseiller et accompagner les futures professionnelles de la beauté du regard et des soins des ongles.

Name: CONFIDENT HAIR TRANSPLANT
Description:
We Specialize in Hair RESTORE and REGROW - 

If you are struggling with hair loss,  we have different methods for you.

DHI HAIR TRANSPLANT
DHI hair transplant surgery is a newer procedure compared to FUE and is similar to the FUE technique, that is, it does not leave a scar after the surgery and provides a natural appearance.

FUE HAIR TRANSPLANT
 Follicular unit extraction (FUE) also known as follicular transfer (FT) it’s one of the primary methods in hair transplantation.

ORGANIC HAIR TRANSPLANT
Organic FUE Hair. Transplantation is a revolutionary innovation in conventional hair transplantation that involves injecting into the scalp a mixture of adipose-derived new texture from the patient’s own adipose tissue.

UNSHAVEN HAIR TRANSPLANT
Unshaven Hair Transplant, Surprisingly, one of the aspects of the hair transplant that bothers potential candidates the most is neither sharp objects nor scars. Is the process of replacing the hair lost due to genetic structure, stress, hormones or aging.

WOMAN HAIR TRANSPLANT
Hair loss affects both men and women, contrary to popular assumption. Follicular Unit Extraction (FUE) or Direct Hair Implantation (DHI) is the optimal method for achieving the necessary outcomes.

Name: Bescansa Laboratories
Description:
In 1812 Mr. Fermin Bescansa Medioroz founded in La Coruña a drug store, therefore it is the oldest laboratory of Spain

In 1843 Dr. Antonio Casares, related to the Bescansa’s family funded the Bescansa’s Pharmacy which is situated in the city centre of Santiago de Compostela, just as it looks today it started to generate the first line of products.

Since the early XX century, marks always associated to Bescansa started to get known, such as LAXANTES, MAREOSAN, DIGESTIVAS,...

They were pioneers applying advertisement for pharmaceutical products, using airplanes, city trains, aerostatic globes etc. as examples for the most expectacular.

Due to the entry of several big enterprises in Spain Bescansa's products started to decrease.

In the early 70's the product's catalogue was reduced until the actual one, without nearly any commercial support.

In the 90’s the laboratory participates in a business headed to the production of natural substances founded by Mr. Pedro Bescansa de la Gándara.

From the experience, the laboratory starts to develop new formulas based on the extract of standards from the most interesting (medical) plants. Some of these formulas are applied in registered products or new products that are waiting for commercializing.

Present
Currently Laboratorios Bescansa is an industry that has an image and renewed facilities. I+D+I agreements have been made with the University of Santiago de Compostela.

Account in its catalog with products of always proven and improved over time and market feedback such as laxatives, acne products and hand protection creams, also has new product lines based on extracts of medicinal plants such as: such as Laxative Bescansa Normal, Docuxen (geriatric laxative) and Ginkgo Biloba Bescansa (tablets and drops).

Future
Currently Laboratorios Bescansa is immersed in a new project to transform its facilities for the manufacture of the dermal products of its ACNOSAN and GLICERMINA brands.

Name: BlackBeard
Description:
BlackBeard

Barber and more…

W jednym z budynków przy ulicy Tęczowej we Wrocławiu składamy hołd klasyce. Dla rzemiosła nie może być innego miejsca jak to, które okryte jest grubym płaszczem historii. Dla barbera nie może być innego miejsca jak to z atmosferą oraz przestrzenią sprzyjającą kreatywności i tworzeniu przyszłości z przeszłości.

BlackBeard to nowe miejsce z klasyczną duszą. To miejsce gdzie specjalista zajmie się pielęgnacją włosów i brody, a Ty zrelaksujesz się przy szklance whisky, rumu lub innego trunku. BlackBeard to nie tylko barber - to kulturalna miejscówka na mapie Wrocławia, gdzie pasja tworzenia łączy się z modą, klasyką oraz powrotem do przeszłości. 
W BlackBeard stawiamy na emocje. W starych murach, które pamiętają wojnę, przeżyjesz coś więcej niż tylko trzydzieści minut u zwykłego fryzjera. Siła charakterów, mocna atmosfera unosząca się w powietrzu, męskie granie dudniące z głośników i fach w ręku, którego nie powstydziłby się najlepszy barber - bo charakter tworzy unikalne miejsce. 

Jeśli szukasz ucieczki od rzeczywistości, relaksu lub po prostu masz wolną chwilę dla siebie, BlackBeard to prawdopodobnie najlepsze miejsce na jakie mogłeś trafić. Zapewniamy jedno z najlepszych cięć we Wrocławiu, niepowtarzalny klimat i alkohole z całego świata.

Przyjdź i przekonaj się na własnej skórze!

Name: LENGLING MUNICH
Description:
LENGLING is an exclusive perfume house from Munich, founded in 2014 by the married couple Christian & Ursula Lengling. Their artistic masterpieces are awarded internationally, embodying the perfect match between opposites, with a unique dual fragrance concept: LENG-Note vs. LING-Note.

LENGLING combines emotion with perfection. Inspired by personal memories, moments and encounters, Ursula Lengling dedicates 2 to 3 years to transform each new perfume creation into an olfactory masterpiece. LENGLING uses only the finest ingredients from around the world with a clear focus on valuable natural raw materials, provided they come from environmentally friendly cultivation. Whether precious vanilla from Madagascar or Arabian jasmine from Egypt, every oil is hand-picked and processed with the utmost care.
LENGLING pays great attention to every detail. One example is the iconic "Isarkiesel", the elegant metal cap that adorns every bottle. It is an exact replica of a pebble from the Isar river in Munich and thus a personal homage to this city. Each one is polished by hand.

Name: Esthetique Le Divine Skin Hair Laser Clinic
Description:
Welcome To Esthetique Le Divine Skin & Hair

We bring to you the aesthetics of beauty and the science of medical knowledge as a single unified service under one roof.

Each visit of yours is led by our expert doctors who start with a skin analysis and take stock of your overall medical condition before they chart out a treatment plan, exclusive for you.

Our carefully balanced combination of aesthetic and clinical approach – from a simple skin peel to a more advanced medical procedure – is planned to suit your own unique individual skin and body needs. We have established this holistic approach to give you the benefits of what the best in the field of science and aesthetics has to offer.

We are the most comprehensive medico-aesthetic clinic that you can choose.

Our expert Dermatologists and Trichologists are rigorously trained to give real results for all your skin and hair concerns.

The treatment that’s right for you will be best decided after an initial consultation at our clinic. We’ll take a closer look at your case, and learn about your goals and health history. From there, our doctor, or a qualified cosmetician, can make informed recommendations.

Our consultations can be very educational: people can be surprised after sitting down with us. What they thought they wanted is actually not the right solution for them. We prevent wasted time and effort, and get straight to the solution, by taking this first step. We encourage you to book today!

Name: Mason Anthony School
Description:
Mason Anthony School of Cosmetology Arts and Sciences is one of the most affordable, flexible and best-reviewed beauty schools in Central Ohio. Offering classes in Cosmetology, Esthetics, Manicuring and Massage Therapy. The school offers low tuition, flexible “pay as you go” plans and a variety of part-time and full-time schedules that allow students to maintain full-time jobs while still completing their education. More than that, the school consistently integrates opportunities to teach entrepreneurship classes, integrates advanced customer service techniques and self-pace teaching methods and delivers a message of “be informed, be authentic, embrace success.”   

The school is female owned and operated by new mother Larissa Witt, who named the school after her son Mason Anthony. “Very simply, we are on a mission! First of all, we saw a significant void in the beauty industry in offering an affordable, flexible education to become a licensed cosmetologist, esthetician, nail technician or massage therapist. I don’t feel price or scheduling issues should ever deter someone for pursuing their passion,” says Witt. “Additionally, as a female entrepreneur my goal with Mason Anthony has always been a low-drama, come-as-you-are place where all individuals (but especially women) can find a place to become empowered, informed and excited about starting and running their own business.” Witt lets her passion drive her to provide the most comfortable and obtainable experience for those who want to attend her school and discover their individual path to success.

Mason Anthony is unparalleled because it offers frequent start dates and a self-paced learning experience. This allows students to start their journey at times that are convenient to their life while also learning at a rate that works best for them. All students are taught and guided through their schooling by licensed cosmetologists and professionals in the industry.

Name: Dastaan Life
Description:
Dastaan Life, founded over three years ago, is a globally recognized grooming brand dedicated to making luxury grooming accessible to everyone. Our roots in the grooming industry run deep, spanning nearly two decades, beginning on the vibrant streets of Australia. With a wealth of experience accumulated over the years, we’ve honed our craft to perfection, making Dastaan Life a beacon of excellence in the world of grooming.

Our mission is simple: to gradually spread a healthy lifestyle choice around the world through the art of grooming. And this is happening in full spring! We have founded Male Alchemy and Mancave barber shops, are operating over 17 luxury salons in Australia, and have recently entered the Middle East market by opening Dastaan Barbers & Beyond our first salon in the esteemed Dubai Mall.

We believe that self-care is the cornerstone of well-being, and every grooming session at Dastaan Life is designed to nourish both body and soul.

Our vision is ambitious—to make Dastaan Life a global phenomenon, renowned for its commitment to luxury, quality, and accessibility. We aspire to touch lives in every corner of the globe, enriching communities with our transformative grooming experiences.

Today, Dastaan Barbers and Beyond stands as a testament to our journey—a journey fueled by passion, dedication, and a relentless pursuit of perfection. 

We invite you to experience the epitome of luxury grooming wherever you are.

 Let's Connect and Elevate Your Grooming Experience Together!

Name: Easy Economy
Description:
Spettacolo Salon | 40 anos transformando beleza em conhecimento

Há mais de quatro décadas, o Spettacolo Salon constrói uma trajetória sólida no mercado da beleza, unindo técnica, inovação e experiência. Muito além de um salão, somos um ecossistema que conecta serviços de alto padrão, educação profissional e soluções para o futuro do setor.

Nossa cultura é baseada no conhecimento contínuo, no aperfeiçoamento técnico e na valorização das pessoas — clientes, profissionais e parceiros. Acreditamos que a excelência nasce do “básico bem feito”, aliado a processos, tecnologia e uma entrega consistente.

Hoje, o Spettacolo atua em diferentes verticais:
• Salões de beleza com atendimento técnico e personalizado
• Academia para formação e desenvolvimento de profissionais
• E-commerce com curadoria de marcas premium do mercado

Seguimos em constante evolução, expandindo fronteiras, investindo em educação, inovação e modelos de negócio que geram impacto real no setor da beleza — no Brasil e no mundo.

Spettacolo Salon
Beleza com propósito. Conhecimento que transforma.

Name: Nouvelle Institute
Description:

Estamos acreditados por NACCAS con el máximo período de acreditación, contamos con licencia del Departamento de Educación de Florida y certificación del Departamento de Educación Federal. Estudiantes que califican pueden acceder a ayudas Pell, Título IV, FSEOG y College Work-Study.

En 2024 fuimos reconocidos como la mejor escuela de programas de belleza en Florida y una de las 50 mejores de la nación, un prestigio que pocas instituciones alcanzan. Nuestro modelo híbrido, instructores expertos y acompañamiento personalizado impulsan altas tasas de aprobación en licencias y apoyo en colocación laboral. Aquí tu talento se convierte en profesión.

Para información sobre nuestros programas, comunícate con nosotros: 
Miami (305) 643-3360 y Hialeah (305) 557-3017

Name: Germaine de Capuccini Benelux
Description:
Elk product van het merk komt uit de eigen fabriek van Germaine de Capuccini gelegen in Alcoy, te Spanje een infrastructuur van 18.000m². De producten worden hier van A tot Z gefabriceerd. Er wordt niets uitbesteed naar het buitenland. Meer dan 200 specialisten delen hun ervaring om tot een topkwaliteit te komen. Professionaliteit, Kwaliteit, Innovatie en Integriteit zijn de waarden die de essentie vormen van de onderneming Germaine de Capuccini.

Germaine de Capuccini Benelux richt zich exclusief tot de professionele schoonheidsspecialiste en spacentra.

Daarnaast ondersteunt Germaine de Capuccini verschillende initiatieven en organisaties die zich inzetten voor vrouwenrechten en empowerment. We streven ernaar vrouwen de tools en middelen te bieden die ze nodig hebben om hun eigen kracht te ontdekken en te omarmen.
 
Zo steunen wij uiteenlopende sociale projecten en bieden wij professionele behandelingen en verzorgingsproducten voor oncologische patiënten. Wij willen het onderzoek naar borstkanker stimuleren en diegenen die een behandeling (hebben) ondergaan een hart onder de riem steken.
 
Sociale Verantwoordelijkheid en duurzaamheid: we werken aan het minimaliseren van onze ecologische voetafdruk en streven een mooiere wereld – letterlijk én figuurlijk. In onze zonneproducten van Expert Sun-lijn gebruiken we alternatieve UV-filters die minder schadelijk zijn voor het mariene ecosysteem. De producten van Germaine de Capuccini worden zorgvuldig samengesteld om het gebruik van microplastics te minimaliseren.
 
We voorzien een braille-etikettering toe op onze product verpakkingen om de toegankelijkheid voor mensen met een visuele beperking te verbeteren. De formules van onze producten bevatten natuurlijke ingrediënten die op duurzame wijze worden geteeld in het kader van programma's zoals BEE (Black Economic Empowerment). 

Link: County Manager Griet Moriaux
https://youtu.be/GL0CY1FRXBc

BTW: BE 0872.520.839 - E.: info@germaine-de-capuccini.be

Name: Elena Peña Estética Oriental
Description:
Hola soy Elena Peña, desde siempre tuve problemas de piel y si has pasado por algo similar, me entenderás perfectamente.

No es fácil, no fue fácil, fueron muchos años sin encontrar soluciones y terminó afectándome a nivel personal y emocional.

Pero un día descubrí algo que me ayudaría.

Nada nuevo que no se conociera desde hace miles de años, nada inédito que las abuelas japonesas y coreanas no supieran para mantener una piel bonita y sobre todo saludable. Aunque para mí, sí que fue algo novedoso.

Quizás por nuestra cultura, en la que todo va demasiado deprisa, en la que cada vez nos separamos más de nosotr@s mism@s, no nos tenemos tan en cuenta a la hora de estar y sentirnos más guap@s.

Algo más que descubrí fue que tanto mi estado físico, como mis emociones habían afectado a mi piel y como combatiendo la raíz, pude corregir y recuperar la piel que siempre deseé.

Además, durante ese proceso, como una maravillosa causalidad (porque yo sí creo en las causalidades), conocí un complemento perfecto, una cosmética revolucionaria que cambiaría mi vida y la de muchas de mis clientas. 

Y así es como he construido mi marca, mi forma de trabajar, de relacionarme con las clientas.

Escucharte para personalizar con técnicas manuales y orientales es una de mis prioridades.

Que recuperes tu mejor versión, no solo estando guapa, sino sintiéndote bien, es otra.

Que noten cambios en tu piel, en tu rostro, también será una prioridad.
... y todo ello lo consigo a través de la personalización en la que creo, la que practico, la que da soluciones.

Name: My Father's Mustache
Description:
We are a full service salon company locally owned and operated by sisters, Debbie Fletcher and Brittany Fletcher Elmore in memory of our father, Mister Wayne. We love our rich heritage, and it is so important to keep the legacy alive that our daddy began. Our father was a barber since the 1960’s. He attended Hassler Barber College in Nashville, TN after he finished his time serving in the U.S. Navy. He went into this profession because he loved people. This is the same reason we are in our careers today. Mister Wayne came back to the Upper Cumberland area after finishing his schooling, and had one of the first unisex salons in the area. He quickly realized the need for training the future generations of professionals in our field, and opened up Wayne and Baretta’s School of Unisex Hair Design in 1979, later renamed to Mister Wayne’s School of Unisex Hair Design in 1981.

We both were blessed to be trained by our daddy in our family owned business. He taught us about not just cutting hair, but how to change lives through what we do every day. That is why we do what we do every single day. We love being a teaching salon, where students are welcome to come shadow, and a place where young licensed professionals can come to work and learn many generations of knowledge. By doing this, we feel we are able to offer our employees a career, instead of a job, and we cannot wait to see how long this legacy is able to live on, even past us!

Name: Royalhair.no
Description:
Royal Hair AS ble etablert i 2021 med en visjon om å være 100% åpne og ærlige med våre kunder.

Over 15 års erfaring fra bransjen.
Vi ønsket å finne det beste kvalitetshåret på markedet og reiste derfor rundt for å teste forskjellige typer. Etter mye testing og leting kom vi over slavisk hår, som er direkte donert og solgt av kvinner fra slaviske land. Slavisk hår er kjent for å ha en glatt og silkemyk tekstur, og er kåret til den beste kvaliteten i verden. Dette gjør håret til det perfekte valget for Hair Extensions.

Med sterk lidenskap for hår og kvalitet ble dette et soleklart valg for oss. Vår målsetting er å levere miljøvennlig Hair Extensions av beste kvalitet til våre kunder, og vi tilbyr derfor kun 100% naturlig hår fra slaviske land. Royal Hair Extensions består ikke av noen form for syntetisk hår, fiber, dyrehår, kanekolon og lignende.

Våre sterkeste sider:
Kvalitet, Miljøvennlighet og Kompetanse.

Name: SkinGallery GmbH
Description:
Skin Gallery – ein Ort, der darauf ausgelegt ist, sich wohl und akzeptiert zu fühlen. Jeder Mensch ist ein Unikat mit eigenem Aussehen, Charakter und einer unterschiedlichen Lebensgeschichte. Wir arbeiten nach dem Slogan: „in our Gallery you are the masterpiece”. Die individuelle Behandlung jedes Gastes als «Kunstwerk» erfüllen wir mit grosser Leidenschaft.

Unsere Dienste sind darauf bedacht, die Kundinnen und Kunden ganzheitlich mit all Ihren Unterschieden zu erfassen. Zu Beginn jeder Behandlung steht ein persönliches Gespräch. Die angestrebten Ziele und Bedürfnisse werden gemeinsam ermittelt und durch ein individuelles Pflegeprogramm in die Tat umgesetzt.

Geniessen Sie dabei pure Entspannung kombiniert mit effektiver Wirkstoffkosmetik. Wer sich eine kosmetische Behandlung gönnt, soll das Ergebnis sichtbar spüren. Ergänzend bieten wir in einer familiären Atmosphäre entspannende Spa und Wellness Angebote alleine oder in Begleitung an, um dem Alltag zu entfliehen und sich zu entspannen.

Was aus Liebe, Lust und Leidenschaft entsteht hat Bestand. Für uns soll unsere Skin Gallery weit mehr sein, als ein Besuch bei der Kosmetikerin. Es umfasst den ganzen Aufenthalt eines Gastes und wenn dieser begeistert unsere Galerie als «Masterpiece» verlässt, haben wir unseren Job bestmöglichst erfüllt.

Name: COHABA - Cosmic Hair Balance
Description:
Mijn eerste stap in het kappersvak zette ik op mijn 18e. Ik was creatief, nieuwsgierig en ambities. Al vrij snel kreeg ik een baan bij Rob Peetoom. Mijn talent en ambitie werd gezien en dat gaf me de drive om het beste uit mijzelf te halen. Op 22-jarige leeftijd was ik Top Stylist en gaf ik trainingen & workshops aan hairstylisten in heel Nederland.

Fast forward naar 2018; mijn focus was me volledig te richten op mijn droom en opende mijn eigen salon begin 2019. Dit werd een groot succes en gaf me de mogelijkheid mijn passie te combineren met mijn persoonlijke groei. De uitdagingen die Covid met zich meebracht, leidden tot een periode van reflectie en vernieuwing. Ik koos er uiteindelijk voor de salon te sluiten, wat ook een kans was om opnieuw te herontdekken wat belangrijk voor me was.

Ik besloot mijn passie verder te verrijken door twee jaar geleden te starten met de opleiding ‘Energetische Heelkunde’. Ik werd geïnspireerd hoe ik deze kennis kon delen in mijn werk en met mijn klanten. Ik stuitte op een specifieke Cosmic haar- en knipbehandeling en bracht een hele nieuwe dimensie aan mijn werk.

Afgelopen zomer (2024), volgde ik een cursus in Hamburg over deze methode, wat mijn visie op mijn vakgebied compleet vernieuwde. Door uit mijn ‘comfort-zone’ te stappen  kon ik wat ik geleerd had samenbrengen. Nu kan ik mijn talenten combineren en mijn klanten een hele een helende en rustgevende behandeling bieden, zowel voor hun haar als voor hun energie. 

Als educator in hart en nieren kwam al snel de behoefte mijn kennis te delen met collega's en hairstylisten, educators en saloneigenaren uit het vakgebied. Ik geef  ook trainingen met mijn specifieke vakkennis en kan op deze anier nog meer mensen leren, en laten ervaren wat  een 'Cosmic Haircut' voor hen en hun business kan betekenen.

Hele min rejse i frisørfaget har altid været drevet af en faglig stolthed -vel vidende at frisørfaget er i konstant udvikling og altid byder på nye udfordringer.

Name: Kyone - Professional hair tools
Description:
The Kyone brand (est. 1999) consists of two companies: Kyone International Trading and Head-Works Trading. We have been a leading company in Europe for years, known for our quality products, extensive service, and attention to detail. Over 25 years ago, two passionate entrepreneurs began creating a brand rooted in craftsmanship, experience, and an eye for detail. That is how Kyone was born.

One of the founders had already built a strong reputation in the Netherlands as one of the most trusted scissor sharpeners. His deep love for precision tools and years of hands-on experience inspired him to go beyond simply maintaining tools and instead develop high-quality products from the ground up.

What began with scissors and electrical styling tools quickly gained recognition across Europe for its quality, reliability, and service. Kyone’s drive to innovate led to a major expansion in 2015 with the launch of our own line of clippers and trimmers, following years of research and development. This marked a new chapter in our journey, delivering tools that meet the highest professional standards and strengthening our position as a leader in the grooming industry.

DEVELOPED, PRODUCED AND USED BY PROFESSIONALS
With a rich history spanning more than three decades, Kyone has built a strong legacy of expertise and innovation in the professional grooming sector. Our ongoing commitment to technological advancement led to the development of our state-of-the-art clippers and trimmers. Every component, technique, and tool has been carefully studied, tested, and refined to meet the highest professional standards. Our dedication to quality ensures that your grooming needs are handled with precision and excellence.

At Kyone, we continue to innovate, develop, and refine our products to deliver exclusive, high-performance tools that professionals can depend on every single day.

Name: Kulture Institute Of Cosmetology
Description:
Inclusive Cosmetology Education for a Diverse Community
Kulture Institute of Cosmetology was founded on the basis of her core values: inclusivity, diversity, equality, and 

belonging. We seek to fully address the beauty needs of non-straight hair-textured demography by providing our 

students with a well-rounded approach to cosmetology curriculum learning outcomes.

Our graduating students are paired with seasoned & experienced industry experts and beauty specialists for 

mentorship to further help in fine-tuning learned skills prior to employment or business start-ups.

 https://www.facebook.com/kultureinstitute/
Inclusivity in Beauty: Kulture Institute's Mission for Cosmetology
Founded by award-winning cosmetologist and educator, Gladys Afolayan. Gladys has witnessed firsthand in her beauty 

haven, Creative Mindz Beauty Center (www.creativemindz.ca) that clients drive from neighboring cities for a hair 

appointment after being on a waiting list for months. There is a huge service gap that requires urgent attention, 

especially with the rapidly evolving demographics of our country and world.
Having recognized this need, the Kulture Institute of Cosmetology was launched.
Our mandate is to:

Equip and empower Cosmetology students and salon owners with the skills needed to cater to clients of all 

ethnicities which will promote inclusivity, diversity, and acceptance in beauty centers.
Create awareness of cultural identity that is rooted in Afro-textured hair artistry.
Reach an underserved marginalized segment of our community, especially students, who strive to learn about Afro-

textured hair, not as an experimental component, but as a skill needed to specialize as a well-balanced graduate of a cosmetology institution

Name: KARAM GROUP
Description:
Karam Kozmetik; 5 yıllık kozmetik sektörü tecrübesini gençliğin 
dinamizmi ile birleştirerek 2017 yılında İstanbul Bayrampaşa’da dış 
ticaret ofisinde faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Geniş ve yenilikçi ruhunu, 
sektör tecrübesi ile harmanlayarak ürünlerine yansıtmakta; gücünü 
ürünlerinin başarısından alarak dünyanın dört bir tarafındaki 
müşterilerine hizmet vermektedir.
Markalarını ve ürün yelpazesini, her geçen gün yeni ürünler ile 
zenginleştiren Karam Kozmetik, daha kapsamlı bir hizmeti yüksek 
kalite ile sunmayı ilke edinmiştir. Karam Kozmetik prensipleri 
gereği doğaya saygılı, insan sağlığına önem veren, yüksek kaliteli 
ürünleri tüketicilerine doğru fiyat politikaları ile sunarken, güvenilir 
satış sonrası hizmeti ile de müşterilerini desteklemektedir. 
Müşteri taleplerini, bölgesel farklılıkları ve piyasa koşullarını analiz 
ederek, ürünlerinin satışlarını yakinen takip eden Karam Kozmetik, 
değerlendirmelerini müşterileri ile paylaşıp, gerekli adımları atarak, 
artı değer kazandırma çalışmalarını aralıksız devam ettirmektedir.
Özetle; geniş ve amatör ruhunun enerjisini, profesyonel bir hizmet 
anlayışıyla bütünleştiren Karam Kozmetik siz değerli müşterilerimize 
geleceğin dünya markasını önermektedir.
Daha fazlasını isteyenler için Karam Kozmetik.

Name: Indian School of Beauty
Description:
Indian School of Beauty - LinkedIn Overview

Welcome to the Indian School of Beauty, where passion meets precision. We are one of India’s premier makeup and beauty academies, empowering aspiring artists with world-class education and hands-on training in the art and science of beauty.

Who We Are

Founded by Neha Joshi (Founder & Executive Director), the Indian School of Beauty is a female-led institution committed to transforming talent into successful careers. With a focus on high-quality education, luxury products, and industry-relevant knowledge, we ensure our students gain the skills and confidence to thrive in the competitive beauty industry.

What We Offer
	•	Comprehensive Courses: From beginner to advanced programs, including Bridal Makeup, International Diploma Courses, and Special Effects (SFX) Makeup.
	•	Luxury Product Access: Internationally acclaimed makeup and skincare brands included in student kits and hands-on training.
	•	Career-Focused Training: Placement assistance, soft skills development, and professional portfolios for every graduate.
	•	Affordable Excellence: High-quality education designed to make premium training accessible to everyone.

Our Impact

We’ve successfully trained countless students who now work with leading beauty brands or run their own businesses, creating opportunities and changing lives. As leaders in beauty education, our commitment goes beyond teaching; we build futures, instilling confidence and creativity in every student.

Join the Indian School of Beauty and become part of a legacy of excellence, innovation, and empowerment in the beauty industry. Together, let’s make your passion your profession.

Connect with us today to learn more!

Name: Svelte Wigs
Description:
At Svelte Wigs, we believe in more than just hair. We believe in restoring confidence, honoring identity, and giving every individual the freedom to feel like themselves again. Our roots lie in recognizing that hair loss, whether from alopecia, chemotherapy, medical challenges, or life transitions, is not merely a cosmetic issue. It is deeply personal. That understanding drives everything we do.

We specialize in premium glueless wigs designed to look natural, feel comfortable, and perform reliably without adhesives. Each wig is crafted with precision, care, and a profound respect for the journeys of our clients. Whether you want a ready-to-ship unit, a same-day wig, extensions, or a medical wig, our offerings are curated for quality, versatility, and beauty.

But our mission does not end at commerce. Through Svelte Cares, our philanthropic arm, we commit to giving back. We provide wigs to women who cannot afford them or whose insurance will not cover them. With your support, we restore confidence one wig at a time.

Guided by values of empathy, expertise, and empowerment, we stand beside you every step of the way. Welcome to Svelte Wigs, where beauty meets purpose.

Name: Intercoiffure-Kosmetik Holliger GmbH
Description:
Unser Konzept „The Culture of Total Beauty“ sagt prägnant, worum es uns geht: Gemeinsam mit unserem Partner LA BIOSTHETIQUE wollen wir unsere Kunden verschönern und verwöhnen.

Das umfasst natürlich zunächst das Ziel, Haare und Haut perfekt zu pflegen. Doch unser Anspruch reicht weiter: Wir möchten, dass unsere Kunden jeden Besuch bei uns als wohltuendes Gesamterlebnis genießen.

Diese Geschäftsphilosophie verdeutlicht unser Leitbild. Es beschreibt unsere Werte als ganzheitlich denkende Haar- und Beautyspezialisten. Es inspiriert uns, unsere Kultur des Miteinanders ebenso weiter zu entwickeln wie unsere fachliche Leistung.

Unsere Kunden

Wir heißen unsere Kunden als Gäste willkommen und empfinden uns als Gastgeber. Jeden Besuch in unserem Salon gestalten wir als wohltuendes Gesamterlebnis. Damit unsere Kunden abschalten und sich entspannen können, schaffen wir eine Atmosphäre der Schönheit und des Wohlbefindens, als Auszeit von der Hektik des Alltags.

Unsere Beratung

Wir tun alles, damit unsere Kunden Haut und Haar sowohl im Salon als auch zu Hause wirkungsvoll pflegen können. Dabei helfen wir ihnen mit unserer Kompetenz und unseren Möglichkeiten.

Unsere Leistung

Der Geschäftserfolg unseres Salons basiert auf hochwertigen Dienstleistungen für schönes Haar und gepflegte Haut. Jeder von uns strebt deshalb danach, professionell und mit größter Sorgfalt zu arbeiten und zu beraten.

Unser Sortiment

Unsere Philosophie lautet: Dienstleistung und Produkt gehören zusammen. Beide gemeinsam garantieren den Behandlungserfolg. Deshalb arbeiten wir ausschließlich mit den exklusiven Produkten von LA BIOSTHETIQUE.

Unsere Mitarbeiter

Wir wollen zu den Besten der Branche gehören. Einzeln und gemeinsam stellen wir unseren anhaltenden Erfolg sicher, indem wir uns weiter entwickeln und voneinander lernen.

Ästhetik ist die schönste Verpflichtung eines Menschen, und Biosthetiker zu sein die schönste Berufung.

Description:
Sautreau Academy Centre de formation en esthétique à Cambrai & La Réunion

Sautreau Academy, école privée de CAP Esthétique et centre de formation reconnu en France et à La Réunion, ouvre ses portes à partir de 16 ans pour vous accompagner dans l’apprentissage des métiers de la beauté. Que vous soyez en contrat d’apprentissage ou à la recherche de formations spécialisées, notre académie s’engage à vous offrir une formation de qualité, adaptée aux exigences du marché du travail.

Centre de formation enregistré sous le numéro de déclaration d’activité n°31590711459.

Notre objectif principal est de vous professionnaliser dans divers domaines de l’esthétisme, tels que l’onglerie, le maquillage, l’extension de cils, et bien plus encore. Grâce à une pédagogie en alternance, vous aurez l’opportunité de découvrir et d’explorer les différentes facettes de l’esthétique, tout en bénéficiant d’un accompagnement personnalisé.

À Sautreau Academy, nous nous engageons à être à l’écoute de nos élèves, en les soutenant activement dans leur parcours professionnel. Notre mission est de vous aider à acquérir des compétences solides qui faciliteront votre intégration en entreprise. Nous vous accompagnons également dans votre recherche d’emploi, en veillant à votre développement au sein de votre structure d’accueil.

Sautreau Academy propose ses formations esthétiques aussi bien en présentiel qu’en ligne. Nos centres de Cambrai et de La Réunion vous accueillent pour des cours pratiques, tandis que notre future plateforme d’e-learning vous offrira une formation esthétique complète à distance, vous permettant de vous former à votre rythme.

Notre école repose sur des valeurs humaines, où l’écoute, l’accompagnement, et l’excellence sont au cœur de notre démarche. Nous mettons à votre disposition des enseignants professionnels et un matériel de qualité pour vous garantir une formation optimale.

Découvrez dès maintenant Sautreau Academy, l’école qui forme les futurs experts de la beauté.

Name: Dra. Karen Lima
Description:
Bem-vindos à Clínica de Estética e Tricologia da Dra. Karen Lima! Nossa missão é cuidar da sua beleza e bem-estar capilar. Estamos dedicados a oferecer soluções personalizadas para problemas capilares, como queda de cabelo, caspa e couro cabeludo sensível. A terapia capilar é uma área da saúde e beleza que se concentra no tratamento de problemas relacionados ao cabelo e ao couro cabeludo. Engloba uma variedade de técnicas e procedimentos para promover a saúde capilar e abordar problemas específicos. 



A Dra. Karen Lima é uma tricologista altamente qualificada, com anos de experiência no diagnóstico e tratamento de questões relacionadas ao cabelo e couro cabeludo. 



Trabalhamos também com a Soroterapia que consiste em um tratamento inovador que pode revolucionar a sua jornada em direção à saúde e ao bem-estar. Com a soroterapia, nutrientes essenciais são administrados diretamente na corrente sanguínea, permitindo uma absorção mais eficiente em comparação com suplementos tradicionais. Se você busca mais energia, melhor imunidade, hidratação da pele ou até mesmo recuperação pós-exercício, a soroterapia pode ser a solução que você procura.



Nossos tratamentos são realizados por profissionais experientes e dedicados, que priorizam a sua saúde e segurança. Cada terapia é personalizada para atender às suas necessidades específicas, com uma variedade de opções de soros que incluem vitaminas, minerais, antioxidantes e muito mais.



Nossa clínica está convenientemente localizada em Samambaia Sul, proporcionando um ambiente acolhedor e confortável para os nossos clientes. Trabalhamos com as mais recentes tecnologias e técnicas em tricologia para garantir resultados excepcionais.



Entre em contato conosco hoje e agende a sua consulta com a Dra. Karen Lima. Estamos ansiosos para ajudá-lo a conquistar cabelos deslumbrantes e uma autoestima renovada. Venha nos visitar e descubra o segredo para cabelos saudáveis e radiantes.

Name: IBIZA Cosmética & Piercing
Description:
Dauerhafte Haarentfernung:
Werde dauerhafte Haarlos am ganzen Körper oder an deiner Wunschstelle ohne sich ständig rasieren oder epilieren zu müssen.

Da ich selber weiss, wie mühsam und zeitaufwendig das Rasieren ist, will meinen Kunden eine dauerhafte und schmerzfreie Haarentfernung anbieten.
 
Mit dem Besitz von dem obligatorischen Sachkundenachweis von dem BAG und dem primelase, der leistungsstärkste Diodenlaser der Welt kann ich jeden Hauttyp behandeln mit der höchsten Qualität und Sicherheit.

Dieser Haarlaser entfernt schnell und effizient Haare.  Klinische Studien zeigen seine Wirksamkeit auch bei hellen Haaren sowie feinen Resthaaren aus vorhergehenden Behandlungen, bereits schon nach der ersten Behandlung.

Piercings:
Als gelernte Fachfrau Gesundheit EFZ beherrsche ich das Stechen und Punktieren von Piercings hervorragend und bringe viel wertvolle Fachkenntnisse mit, neben meiner spezifischen Piercing-Ausbildung.

Lass deine Persönlichkeit mit meinen individuellen Schmuckstücken zum Ausdruck kommen und vertraue auf meine professionelle Hand, um ein sicheres und ästhetisches Ergebnis zu erzielen.

Name: iloveme cosmetics
Description:
Spojením toho najlepšieho z prírody s účinnými látkami zo svetovej organickej kozmetológie a biotechnológie, vznikla unikátna beauty rada organickej kozmetiky iloveme "Minimalist Beauty Routine Skincare".

Našou hlavnou prioritou je vysoká kvalita, efektivita a bezpečnosť. V jednoduchosti je krása, a preto v našej ponuke nájdete výnimočné organické produkty obohatené o aktívne anti-age látky v účinných a bezpečných koncentráciách.

︎ SKINIMALIZMUS
Všetky naše kozmetické prípravky spĺňajú koncept synergického účinku viacerých aktívnych látok v jednom prípravku.
Celá kozmetická rada iloveme má vyvážené a komplexné zloženie s účinnými látkami. Jednotlivé prípravky na seba naväzujú a navzájom sa dopĺňajú.

︎ "ZELENÁ" BIOTECHNOLÓGIA
Používame biotechnologické kozmetické ingrediencie, ktoré sú vytvárané na základe vedeckého výskumu. Takéto zložky sú účinnejšie, bezpečné pre ľudí aj pre životné prostredie. Zároveň sú vedecky testované a ich účinok a bezpečnosť overené.

︎ EURÓPSKY PÔVOD
Vždy keď je to možné, preferujeme kozmetické suroviny z európskeho priestoru s ECOCERT alebo COSMOS certifikátmi. V našich prípravkoch nájdete tradičné európske oleje ako je marhuľový, slivkový, malinový, šípkový, mokraďkový, rakytníkový, olej z pšeničných klíčkov a ďalšie.

︎ BIOFOTONICKÉ SKLO
Naše produkty si zaslúžia byť zabalené v čo najlepšom balení. Preto sme sa rozhodli používať špeciálne BioFotonické sklo, ktoré zachováva kvalitu našich prípravkov bez použitia veľkého množstva konzervantov a predĺži stabilitu vzácnych biotechnologických zložiek a prírodných olejov.

Jedinečné vlastnosti fialového skla odfiltrujú škodlivejšie lúče spektra viditeľného svetla a umožnia vstupu častí vĺn UVA a infračerveného svetla, čím udržia výrobky vnútri čerstvejšie po dlhšiu dobu. BioFotonické sklo nám umožnilo sa vyhnúť ďalšiemu obalu - papierovej krabičke.

Name: Tyciie Cosmetics
Description:
My name is Tanisha Chincholkar and I am the CEO and founder of Tyciie Cosmetics, a line of beautiful and easy lip care formulated with pure and natural ingredients sourced from the most certified ingredients collected from across India and USA. 

We believe in chosing clean lip, skincare for your skin surface resulting in a beautiful clean complexion as well as plump luscious lips ! Our brand is mainly focused on making our products free from harmful chemicals and toxins hence, having amazing results on our consumers skin and lips. We have our roots in experience and trying and testing different formulations based on the different skin types in India, laser targetting skin and lip issues in a natural and non harmful way. 

Our name is derived from the founders name Tanisha Chincholkar, TC, Tyciie.

How it started : 
The Tyciie Cosmetics journey began when I laid my eyes upon a Youtube Video when I was 17 years old and I did not really think much of it. But as time passed my thoughts narrowed down more and more as us teens were obsessed with our looks and specially applying lip balms. 

Naturally I started buying lip balms too and applying them, but they did not really suit my complexion nor my skin type. They gave me rashes and boils, that got me thinking, why? I started researching more and more and by the time I was done with my 12th I had a vast selection of videos downloaded and paperwork done regarding the harmful ingredients used in commercial lip products which cause more harm to you than do good. So I decided to make my own. 
Why us ? 
Safety : 

Our reviews can speak for themselves. 

Our products have no Sulphates, no Parabens, no harmful dyes, no harmful chemicals, bleaching agents or any toxic substances in them. 

Honesty : 

I have a Youtube channel as well as multiple videos on my socials, showing how I make my products as well as disclosing the whole ingredient list on each and every product so you know whats going into your products.

Name: La Peluquerida
Description:
LA PELUQUERIDA MAS QUE UN SALON UN ESPACIO PARA TU BIENESTAR.

La Peluquerida abrió sus puertas en 2016 como una peluquería comprometida con el uso de productos respetuosos con el medio ambiente y libres de químicos agresivos. Desde el principio, nuestro propósito ha sido ofrecer una experiencia de belleza consciente y sustentable. Sin embargo, con el paso del tiempo, el enfoque ha evolucionado para no solo cuidar del medio ambiente, sino también asegurar que los servicios que brindamos no descuiden la salud y el bienestar de nuestras clientas.

Este cambio en nuestra filosofía se dio tras una experiencia transformadora de nuestra fundadora, Paulina Martínez, quien fue diagnosticada con cáncer unos años después de fundar La Peluquerida. Este diagnóstico llevó a Pauli a embarcarse en un viaje de sanación que transformó su vida y el propósito del salón. A partir de ese momento, nuestra misión no solo se centra en la belleza externa, sino en ofrecer un espacio que promueva el bienestar integral, desde la salud capilar hasta el bienestar emocional y espiritual.

Hoy, La Peluquerida es más que un salón de belleza. Creemos que la verdadera belleza surge cuando las personas se sienten bien por dentro y por fuera. Nuestros servicios no solo potencian tu propia belleza natural, sino que también cuidan de tu salud capilar utilizando productos orgánicos y naturales obteniendo un servicio más limpio para tu cuerpo. Además, ofrecemos terapias holísticas como Reiki y Code Lemuria, con el objetivo de que cada visita no solo te haga ver bien, sino que te invite a cuidar todo tu ser

“La peluquería es solo una excusa para algo mucho más grande: conectar con tu esencia, tu ser y bienestar.”Paulina Martínez, Fundadora.

Name: MoniQue's — Natural Hair Care & Beauty Studio
Description:
MoniQue's Natural Hair Care and Beauty Studio salon products and services focus on natural hair health and growth, from children to senior adults. Damaged hair can be a real bummer, but there are some tricks to bring those locks back to life! First up, hydration is vital. Our deep conditioning treatments and hair masks can work wonders. We manufacture products by hand with all-natural ingredients like avocado, aloe vera, green tea, coconut, rosemary, and Jamaican castor oils. Get your sexy back with hair health innovations and services you can trust. Visit your neighborhood MoniQue's today.

Trimming your hair regularly helps get rid of split ends and prevents the damage from traveling up the hair shaft. It might sound counterintuitive, but cutting off those dead ends can actually help your hair grow healthier.

We're gentle when handling wet hair because it's more prone to breakage. When washing your hair, pat it dry instead of rubbing vigorously with a towel. During restoration treatments, ease up on the styling tools. If you must use them, make sure to use a heat protectant spray first.

Lastly, eat a balanced diet and staying hydrated contribute to the overall health of your hair. Nutrients like vitamins A and E, as well as biotin, are particularly hair-friendly.

Remember, it might take some time, but with a little TLC, your hair will thank you! Health first, then beauty. No cash but need a hairdue—we got you, with our subscription plan—yes you can! So come on down to MoniQue's Natural Hair Care and Beauty and let's turn that frown up side down!

My name is Monique, Founder/Owner and I approve this message.
