Our licensed Esthetician specializes in creating a harmonious blend of Esthetics and Reiki, fostering a serene and rejuvenating environment that nurtures physical, emotional, and spiritual wellness.

Our customized treatments are meticulously tailored to address each individual's unique needs, ensuring optimal results. We leverage the power of medical-grade skincare products that are not only natural but also highly effective, promoting healthy and radiant skin.

In addition to our facial services, we provide a diverse array of offerings to cater to all aspects of your beauty and self-care routine. This includes personalized product recommendations, curated skincare regimens for at-home care, individual Reiki energy healing sessions, group Reiki and guided meditation sessions, waxing services, and a wide range of makeup application services.

Additionally, we specialize in conducting basic makeup trainings, both individual & group, to empower you with the knowledge and skills to enhance your natural beauty confidently.

Whether you're seeking expert guidance on managing challenging skin conditions like Rosacea, Eczema, Psoriasis, Acne, or aiming to diminish and reverse the signs of aging, we have specialized treatments designed to meet your specific goals.

The Lovely Lia Esthetics is located within Haven, a wonderful holistic wellness spa in Longview, WA, where our Esthetician is available to serve you with her expertise Saturday-Wednesday's from 10:00am to 6:00pm. She also operates on a mobile basis, extending her services from the Longview area all the way down to the greater Portland area.

Experience our transformative skincare services and embark on a journey towards radiant beauty and holistic wellness. Book your skincare service today and discover a new level of self-care and rejuvenation.

Name: SOHO Hair Academy
Description:
You don’t need a beauty school with decades of history, you deserve a hair academy with VISION! SOHO Hair Academy is focused on the future. Our standards for advancement, passionate and experienced Educators, and supportive culture that values growth, community, and personal integrity are keys to success. The beauty industry changes fast. 

We are proud to introduce SOHO Hair Academy, a reimagined cosmetology program designed to grow new leaders for the beauty industry. The Academy will expand education beyond the Historical State Board curriculum and bring an unprecedented level of business acumen to inspire a new generation of beauty professionals to become local business employers and leaders. It is time to heal the stigma that beauty professionals do not make a livable wage working together.

At the heart of SOHO Hair Academy is love. Love for this industry is the magic that unites, grows, heals and cures. SOHO Academy is committed to putting differences aside, advocating for each other’s basic human rights, and becoming better allies.

We are prioritizing creating a safe space for students, guests and our team. Putting humans first is the beauty and true art of cosmetology. We hold space and see the unique individual beauty of others. The magic is when they see and believe in themselves. We believe that serving students through the lens of love gives our academy’s students an authentic experience.

As successful award winning salon owners, we wanted to bring our expertise to reimagine a modern cosmetology program.  The dream of offering students access to superior products, an extensive recycling and zero-waste effort, a masterclass education, a national network of opportunities, personal, career and business coaching is now a reality. We are dedicated to providing the most current curriculum, relevant practical techniques and inspiring our students to be the future beauty professional leaders the industry needs. We are obsessed with our student’s futures!

Creemos firmemente que el éxito reside en la formación continua y por ello nuestro centro de formación asociado, MASTERHAIR se encarga de formar e informar a los profesionales del sector.
COMPROMETIDOS CON LA INNOVACIÓN, LA SOSTENIBILIDAD, LA CALIDAD Y LOS CLIENTES
En K-PPEL estamos muy comprometidos con la innovación y por ello, acudimos regularmente a las ferias internacionales más importantes del sector Hong Kong, Bolonia, Las Vegas, Madrid y Barcelona, para conocer de primera mano las últimas novedades, tendencias y productos punteros, ofreciendo a nuestros clientes ese conocimiento exclusivo. También incorporamos constantemente productos naturales, libres de tóxicos y veganos. Para asegurar la calidad de nuestros contamos con el certificado UNE EN ISO 9001:2015
Seas profesional o particular nos gustaría ayudarte a obtener lo mejor de ti mismo o de tu empresa. Contacta con nosotros o acude a nuestras tiendas, todo el equipo humano de K-PPEL estará encantado de ayudarte y asesorarte, porque tal y como dice nuestro lema: “Tu éxito, nuestro objetivo”.

Name: To-me Cosmetics
Description:
-	Founded in 1996 by Mr. Suleiman Abu Hadwan, S.O.C was born from a story of passion, craftsmanship and vision. 
-	Mr. Suleiman, born in Hebron in 1952, began his journey as a talented barber whose creativity and dedication quickly transcended the boundaries of a single profession. Together with his sons, he transformed this humble beginning into a fully integrated company that today stands as a powerhouse in the beauty and personal care industry. The name S.O.C reflects not only the vision of its founders but also the enduring legacy of their values and ambitions. Through strategic growth and a relentless commitment to quality, S.O.C has established itself as a market leader locally and regionally. The company has built a comprehensive ecosystem that includes state-of-the-art factories, advanced training programs, robust local and international distribution networks, and a portfolio of successful brands that define industry standards. At the forefront of these achievements is To-Me Cosmetics, the company’s flagship brand, widely recognized for its excellence and certified with prestigious international quality standards such as ISO and GMP. Complementing this success is the AXE Factory, a cornerstone of S.O.C’s integrated structure, ensuring innovation and precision across its production lines. Today, S.O.C is more than a company—it is a story of heritage and progress, where tradition meets modernity. With pride in its roots and a clear vision for the future, S.O.C continues to shape the beauty industry, driven by values of integrity, innovation, and impact.

Name: StyleAcademy
Description:
A idéia de fundar uma escola nasceu da percepção de que, apesar do mercado estar vacante, muitos profissionais de beleza não conseguem colocação por falta de qualificação.  Os altos custos de cursos especializantes tiram a chance de emprego de muitas pessoas. 
Assim nasceu a StyleAcademy e dentro dela o Instituto Pronta para o Futuro, uma ONG inclusiva sem fins lucrativos e apartidária que oferece cursos a aqueles, que por falta de recursos, não puderam se qualificar. O objetivo é treinar e capacitar pessoas para o área de beleza e encaminhá-las ao mercado de trabalho.
O curso garante a compreensão do tipo de beleza de seu cliente, através da adequação de imagem, pois cada ser humano possui um rosto, formato e tipo único. O aluno aprenderá a identificar esse tipo de perfil e a trabalha-lo de forma adequada. 
Não é necessário experiência prévia. A nossa metodologia garante que mesmo o aluno que nunca tenha atuado na área, se formará com excelência e pronta para trabalhar no ramo. 
Metodologia: 
O curso de Cabelo, Maquiagem e Unhas serão dividido em três estágios: Iniciantes, Intermediário e Profissional;
O aluno aprenderá a trabalhar de forma personalizada, a beleza sob medida. Se formará sabendo criar um estilo que integre com as necessidades funcionais, biológicas e emocionais do cliente. 
Na prática o curso implementa essa técnica auxiliando no atendimento mais humanizado. Cada ser humano possui um formato de rosto diferente, uma aparência e tipo único, portanto o aluno será treinado para aprender a identificar esse perfil e a trabalhá-lo de forma adequada. 
Concluído o curso, o aluno estará apto a fazer adequação de imagem, compreender o perfil de seu cliente e fazer o devido direcionamento. 
Ao obter o diploma da StyleAcademy, o aluno será encaminhado para trabalhar no ramo, seja nas unidades Stylebar ou no aplicativo que atende a domicilio.

Name: INK & FADES - Jekta Storsenter
Description:
Skin Fuel Empire Tattoo & Piercing og Bergen Barberstue, to av Bergens mest anerkjente navn innenfor tatovering, piercing og barbering, kunngjør i dag en spennende sammenslåing. 
 
De to selskapene forener sine krefter for å skape et nytt og banebrytende konsept, Ink & Fades.
 
Jan Rudi Bendiksen, grunnlegger av Skin Fuel Empire, og Tommy Kronstad, eier av Bergen Barberstue, har sammen bygget solide virksomheter med imponerende meritter. Jan Rudi har drevet Skin Fuel Empire i snart 10 år med fem vellykkede avdelinger, mens Tommy har opparbeidet seg 4 avdelinger i en sterk posisjon i markedet med Bergen Barberstue gjennom nesten 10 år med kvalitetstjenester.
 
Ink & Fades vil være den ultimate destinasjonen for alle som søker eksklusive opplevelser innen tatovering, piercing og barbering. Vår visjon er å sette standarden for bransjen og tilby en unik kombinasjon av kunstnerisk uttrykk og profesjonell pleie.
 
Sammenslåingen gir oss muligheten til å utvide vårt tilbud og nå ut til flere kunder med høy kvalitet og kreativitet som kjennetegner begge våre tidligere selskaper.

Ink & Fades representerer vår felles visjon om å skape en helhetlig opplevelse for våre kunder, vi ser frem til å bringe sammen det beste fra tatovering, piercing og barbering under ett tak.
 
Vi er glade for å kunne annonsere at den første butikken som vil transformeres fra Skin Fuel Empire til Ink & Fades, ligger på Jekta Storsenter i Tromsø. Denne ombyggingen vil starte i uke 41. Etter dette vil vi gradvis oppgradere våre eksisterende avdelinger i Bergen og Stavanger. 
 
Dette markerer starten på vår plan om å åpne 15-20 nye studioer i løpet av de neste fem årene.

Ciaran understands the power of unique, rare and authentically Irish ingredients and wants to show case them through his product range.
As a professional hair stylist and barber, Ciaran knows hair to an expert level, and has used this knowledge to construct original, bespoke formulations with the help of a Cosmetic Chemist.
 KiwiSalt formulations are compliant in the EU, UK and USA markets.

Name: BEE TOX cosmetics
Description:
The BEE TOX cream is the only natural anti-aging cream that has a truly noticeable effect from the first application. It is a cream made from bee venom, which we best describe as natural botox. #BotoxCosmetics

 Its main ingredient is 100% natural bee venom, which tightens the skin, significantly accelerates blood circulation in the capillaries, smooths out wrinkles, and with regular use prevents the formation of new ones. For better effectiveness, the cream is enriched with hyaluronic acid, which ensures that the bee venom penetrates deeper into the skin, shea butter, which provides nourishing effects especially for mature skin, and rosehip oil, which is an exceptional source of vitamins A and C, making the skin healthier. By using BEE QUEEN cream, the skin will be more velvety, soft, and radiant – without unhealthy chemicals. #NaturalCosmetics

 It is important to emphasize that the quality of our bee venom is the best in the world! It contains as much as 72% melittin (that's the substance in bee venom that works), while in other bees around the world, the presence of melittin is approximately 50%. We obtain bee venom in an innovative and refined way, where not a single bee dies! I want to emphasize that when collecting bee venom, we do not harm our bees in any way. It is collected in a way that the bee stings into glass and because its sting does not get stuck, it flies away. #BeesFriendly

 You can read more about the cream at: 
 www.bee-tox.si

Name: The iconic Skin
Description:
The Iconic Skin: Elevating Skincare with Science and Quality

Introduction

The Iconic Skin is a dermatologist-tested cosmetic brand committed to redefining skincare with high-quality, effective, and safe products designed for all skin types. With a passion for beauty and science, our brand formulates skincare solutions that cater to diverse skin needs while ensuring optimal health and radiance.

Our Mission

At The Iconic Skin, our mission is to provide high-quality, dermatologist-tested skincare products that are both effective and safe. Our products nourish, protect, and rejuvenate the skin using scientifically backed formulations that deliver real results.

Our Product Line

The Iconic Skin offers a comprehensive range of skincare products tailored to address various concerns, including hydration, anti-aging, acne prevention, and skin brightening. Our product line includes:

Cleansers – Gentle yet effective cleansers that remove impurities without stripping moisture.

-2007

Le centre de Formation Thalass’Sun fut se crée en 2007 et s’installe à Malo les Bains et crée unensemble de plus de 10 formations soins corporels pour répondre à la demande des instituts et de leur clientèle de plus en plus exigeante.

Un succès garanti dans la ville de Tarbes

Et Thalass’sun Formation Dunkerque s’agrandit toujours plus et déménage place de la Mairie à Rosendael..

- Aujourd’hui, 

Nous vous accueillons dans un espace alliant une grande modernité et une atmosphère relaxante.

A ce jour, notre objectif : faire de nos élèves des professionnelles de la beauté et du Bien Etre avec un enseignement structuré et individualisé.

Description:
Esthetician in Los Angeles, CA PROVIDE FULL SERVICE: HydraFacial Treatments, Face Facials, Body Sculpting, Acne, Microneeding Meso, Face Massage, LED Lights Treatments
These facials consist of cleansing, exfoliation or skin resurfacing (often as microdermabrasion treatments), masks, deep-pore cleansing with extractions, and hydration elements.

Deep cleaning facial, this type of facial treatment profoundly purifies the skin and will usually include multiple rounds of extractions to unclog the pores.

A HydraFacial is a facial treatment using a patented device to deliver exfoliation, cleansing, extraction, and hydration to the face. This system uses a vortex swirling action to deliver hydration and to remove dead skin, dirt, debris, and impurities while cleaning and soothing your skin.

Microneedling is a minimally invasive procedure for your skin. Your healthcare provider uses thin needles to make tiny holes in the top layer of your skin. The damage helps stimulate your skin's healing process, so it produces more collagen and elastin. These proteins keep your skin firm and smooth.

RF microneedling utilizes ultrafine needles, along with LED lights emitting radiofrequency waves, to produce thermal energy. The process involves irritating the skin and stimulating its repair response, while encouraging the body's ability to naturally produce collagen.

Fractional RF microneedle is a minimally invasive technology that involves the use of an array of very fine sterilized needles to create microscopic wounds at various predetermined depths in the dermis, without affecting the epidermis.

A chemical peel is a procedure in which a chemical solution is applied to the skin to remove the top layers. The skin that grows back is smoother. With a light or medium peel, you may need to undergo the procedure more than once to get the desired results.

A Mandelic acid peel is a chemical peel that uses a solution containing Mandelic acid to exfoliate the top layer of the skin.

Name: Real Beauty London
Description:
RealBEAUTY London was founded by Alexis, a dedicated stay-at-home mother at the age of 37. Her journey began six years ago when she experienced a derma rolling treatment at a salon. Although the procedure was effective, it was invasive and far from enjoyable. However, the remarkable results left an indelible impression.

A few years later, Alexis encountered numerous signs of sun damage and pigmentation spots on her forehead. Determined to address these concerns at home, she acquired her own derma roller and started a weekly routine. The transformation was astounding; within just six weeks, her sun spots began to fade, and her fine lines vanished. Remarkably, after three months of using the derma roller only once a week, her sun spots completely disappeared, leaving her skin looking firmer and radiantly glowing.

Recognising that this transformative treatment could be intimidating for first-time users and the lack of affordable, all-inclusive at-home kits on the market, Alexis embarked on a mission to simplify the process. After months of research and the development of her special serum, RealBEAUTY London was born.

Né de la volonté de professionnels des métiers de la coiffure afin de répondre aux problématiques inhérentes à ce secteur nous sommes en mesure de :
Former à un savoir-faire, un savoir-être et à accompagner au mieux nos apprenants jusqu'à leurs futurs emplois.

Notre ambition se distingue par une volonté d’agir en faveur de l’innovation éducative grâce à une méthode concrète, professionnalisante et sur mesure.

Face aux évolutions des métiers de la coiffure nous avons fait le choix d’ajouter à nos cursus pédagogique 2 modules :

- Coaching Barbier 
- Coaching “Savoir-être et Savoir-faire”

De plus nous mettons en place un réel accompagnement de nos apprenants dans leur recherche d'alternance, grâce à des coaching ponctuels (savoir-être en entreprise, recherche de patron, entretien d’embauche).

Nous nous sommes inspirés des plus grandes écoles de gastronomie et donc prônons la rigueur et la discipline au service de l’excellence. 

Afin d’atteindre nos objectifs, nous nous sommes entourés d’artisans formateurs reconnus dans le milieu de la beauté, de la coiffure et du barber-shop.

La pratique étant au cœur de l’apprentissage des métiers artisanaux, accompagnés de leurs formateurs nous confrontons dès que possible et de manière sécurisante nos apprenants à la réalité de leur métier, grâce à nos salons d’applications qui accueillent tous les jours une clientèle exigeante sur lesquels ils peuvent exercer leur savoir-faire. 

Rejoindre le CFA Jean-Claude Aubry Paris/Créteil c’est plus que se former à un métier, c’est se former à un métier-passion dans lesquels vous pourrez évoluer et construire une carrière à votre image artistiquement et financièrement.

Name: You do you lipsticks
Description:
This story is all about the pain we've felt, the betrayals, the lies, the hurts, the times we've been let down, and the struggles.
But it's also about how we've managed to bounce back, find strength, be brave, and eventually become the people we were always meant to be.
There are days when I'm just as lost as you might be. Some days, I cry until the sun comes up, get angry, or have moments where I feel like I've got it all together – even when I really don't.
My life has been filled with pain, scars, betrayals, and so many lies that it's hard to believe in what was once true.
But I decided to use my pain as a source of strength, hoping to offer a glimmer of hope to anyone who needs it. A reminder to keep going, never give up, and know that if you've hit rock bottom, the only way is up.
I see you, I feel you, because I've been there too. Never apologize for being yourself.
Embrace your story, all of it – the pain, the sadness, the happiness, and the moments of empowerment. Embrace your uniqueness.
I spent way too long trying to change for someone else, no matter what I did, it was never enough. So, here I am, being me, unapologetically.
To me, there's nothing more meaningful in life than showing a bit of kindness to someone who needs it.
So, with my lipsticks, it's not just my story, it's yours too.
Many of us have been through similar experiences,
so this is our story, shared together!

Description:
VIVE Hair Society is more than just a business name; it's a philosophy that embodies the essence of its founder, Jackie Lucas. The name “VIVE” is derived from the Latin word meaning "to live," which represents the idea of living life to its fullest potential and embracing each day with purpose and intention. Jackie's personal journey inspired the creation of VIVE Hair Society, a mission-driven business that empowers people to live authentically and embrace their unique journey.

VIVE Hair Society is committed to providing high-quality products and services that help individuals feel confident, beautiful, and inspired to create a positive impact in their communities. They use sustainable beauty brand Davines hair products, known for its commitment to the environment and social responsibility.  

The location of VIVE Hair Society at 44 Kainehe St. puts clients in the heart of Kailua's hottest hangout spot, with the Beer Garden at Boardroom opening just outside. Clients can enjoy hair services, cocktails, and live music in one convenient location.

Founder Jackie Lucas has been a licensed cosmetologist for 13 years and specializes in balayage and "lived in looks." She began her journey at just 16 years old attending Cosmetology school, simultaneously graduating from high school with her Cosmetology license. She continued to develop her skill set through a 2 year apprenticeship and went on to become the General Manager of a hair salon and boutique in Cleveland, Ohio for 8 years prior to her move to Hawaii. She’s received training from industry professionals around the world, traveling to Chicago, Miami, New York City, and Italy. She even had the privilege to attend the World Wide Hair Tour in Parma, Italy at the launch of the Davines Village - the global headquarters and sustainable beauty destination including a regenerative organic farm, research center, and education hub.

For more information about VIVE Hair Society, visit us on instagram @vive.hairsociety

Name: Bermoda Çocuk Kuaförü
Description:
Bermoda Çocuk Kuaförü – Hakkında

Kurucular:
Ali Aydınlıoğlu, kuaförlük mesleğine 1994 yılında, Etiler Narin Sitesi’nde bulunan Narin Kuaför’de adım atmıştır.

Yaşar Aydınlıoğlu ise mesleğe 1992 yılında, Akatlar’da bulunan Akça Kuaför’de başlamıştır.

1999 yılından itibaren, Film Sokağı Stüdyoları ve Dinamo Yapım Şirketi’nin çocuklara yönelik reklam ve klip projelerinde profesyonel çocuk kuaförlük hizmeti sunmuşlardır.

Edindikleri bilgi ve tecrübelerle birlikte, 2003 – 2007 yılları arasında Carousel AVM’de bulunan Toys"R"Us mağazasında çocuk kuaförlüğü hizmetlerine devam etmişlerdir.

2007 – 2010 yılları arasında ise hizmetlerini Town Center AVM’deki mağazada sürdürmüşlerdir. AVM’nin kapanmasının ardından, faaliyetlerine İstanbul Bakırköy’deki mevcut salonlarında devam etmişlerdir.

2025 yılı itibarıyla 1. Levent MetroCity AVM ve Bakırköy Şubeleri, yetki ve belgeleriyle birlikte profesyonel çocuk kuaförlüğü hizmeti vermeye devam etmektedirler.

Herkesin her işi yaptığı günümüzde, fark etmenizi istediğimiz ayrıcalık, biz sadece bebek ve çocuk saç kesimi yapıyoruz, çok iyi bildiğimiz işi yapıyoruz daima bir adım önde hizmet veriyoruz.

Saygılarımızla, Bermoda Çocuk Kuaförü

So in the early 2000s, she made that dream a reality by setting up her first salon in Chennai. It took her only a while to understand the market potential and the ever-increasing demand for professional grooming. In 2004 her husband co-founder & CEO, CK Kumaravel joined and ever since then, the Naturals team has been able to meet every challenge in this competitive industry.

Name: آرایشگاهی
Description:
ما در فروشگاه تجهیزات آرایشگاهی ، به عنوان یکی از پیشروان در ارائه بهترین و باکیفیتترین تجهیزات آرایشگاهی، به آرایشگران و سالنهای زیبایی کمک میکنیم تا به بالاترین سطح حرفهای بودن دست یابند. 
ما با تمرکز بر روی نیازهای منحصر به فرد مشتریانمان، سعی بر آن داریم تا محصولاتی را عرضه کنیم که نه تنها دوام و عملکرد بالا داشته باشند، بلکه زیبایی و راحتی را نیز به همراه داشته باشند.

تجهیزات و ابزارهای ما شامل:

قیچیهای حرفهای: از برندهای معتبر جهانی مانند جگوار، کیووا و ... که دقت و کیفیت بالایی در برش دارند.
صندلیهای آرایشگاهی: طراحیهای ارگونومیک برای راحتی مشتریان و کاهش فشار کاری بر روی آرایشگران، همراه با مواد با کیفیت بالا. شامل انواع صندلی کوپ و کوتاهی و صندلی های میکاپ جکی و تمام الکترونیک.
ماشینهای اصلاح: با تکنولوژیهای پیشرفته برای برشهای تمیز و دقیق.
سشوارهای حرفهای: با قابلیت تنظیم دما و سرعت برای انواع موها، بدون آسیب رساندن به آنها.
اتوهای مو: برای صاف کردن مو با فناوریهای ضد آسیب مو.
میزها و کابینتها: انواع میز ترولی طراحی شده برای استفاده بهینه از فضا و نگهداری تجهیزات به شکلی مرتب و دسترسی آسان. و سرشور های حرفه ای
لوازم جانبی: از قبیل کیپها، برسها، شانهها و ابزارهای مختلف دیگر که هر آرایشگاهی به آنها نیاز دارد.

چرا ما را انتخاب کنید؟

کیفیت برتر: ما با همکاری برندهای معتبر، تضمین میکنیم که تجهیزاتمان بهترین کیفیت را دارا هستند.
خدمات پس از فروش: تیم پشتیبانی ما همیشه آماده پاسخگویی به سوالات و ارائه خدمات تعمیر و نگهداری است.
قیمت مناسب: ما مفتخریم که محصولات با کیفیت را با قیمتهای رقابتی ارائه میدهیم تا همه آرایشگران بتوانند از ابزارهای حرفهای استفاده کنند.
مشاوره تخصصی: تیم ما با دانش و تجربه بالا، آماده است تا به شما در انتخاب بهترین تجهیزات متناسب با نیازهایتان کمک کند.

Name: Bryde Simonsen
Description:
Hos Bryde Simonsen gør vi os umage - vi gør os umage hver gang! At få en skønhedsbehandling i dag er ikke bare en beslutning om at opnå et resultat, det er en beslutning om at investere i dig selv, prioritere din tid og forkæle dig selv.

Bryde Simonsen er en hudplejeklinik med fokus på den gode total oplevelse, hvor der er tid til reflektion, forkælelse, omsorg og fordybning.

Som behandlere er vi vilde med vores arbejde og vi er vilde med hinanden. Det er den største byggesten i Bryde Simonsen. Vi samarbejder ikke bare men støtter, opmuntrer, udfordrer, glæder og respekterer hinanden. Vi har det sjovt og hygger os sammen og den kærlige atmosfære vi oplever sammen, håber vi smitter af på alle, der træder ind ad vores dør.

Com uma equipe de profissionais altamente especializados, estamos comprometidos em elevar a experiência de cuidado com a barba e cabelo a um nível totalmente novo. Além disso, somos uma escola profissionalizante de renome, dedicada a moldar as futuras gerações de barbeiros talentosos. Ao longo do ano, oferecemos treinamento de alta qualidade e oportunidades de aprendizado prático para aqueles que desejam entrar no mundo emocionante e em constante evolução da barbearia.

Junte-se a nós para uma experiência de cuidados com a barba e cabelo excepcional ou descubra suas paixões e habilidades em nosso programa de formação profissional. A Barbearia Medellín é onde o estilo encontra a inovação, e estamos ansiosos para compartilhar essa paixão com você. Conecte-se conosco e faça parte da nossa comunidade de estilo e profissionalismo.

Name: Dr. Barber Academy
Description:
The Barber/Beauty Industry is a multi-billion dollar industry. Educating within the industry breaks down into a number of sub-markets. 1. Educating practitioners; those that will administer services at shops, salons and spas. 2. Educating salon, shop, and spa owners. Those that concentrate on creating jobs, creating atmosphere and culture of a personal care business. 3. Educating Instructors; those who decimate knowledge about the different facets of the industry and create a great learning atmosphere for students to thrive in, and focus on what part of this vast industry they can participate in. There are more aspects of the industry, like product production, retailing products, and more. Our unique strategy to meet the need of our targeted students/consumers will give them the advantage of rare opportunities that exist in Barber/Beauty Business.

Our Business Sectors:

•  The Academy of Barbering & Cosmetology (Dr. Barber Academy) Education | Classes
•  Dr. Barber Signature Product Line (Haircare & Skincare Products)
•  The Academy Foundation (Nonprofit Organization)

The Academy Foundation

The Academy Foundation purpose is to help underprivileged individuals in our community and give the disadvantage proportion a chance to learn how to break into multi-billion dollar industry. All while getting licensed one of the world's oldest trades. The Academy foundation’s future will be shaped by the core values that have defined our academic passion we have for helping others using our dedicated staff and years of expertise.

We will address underserved communities with business & job opportunities. Nurture social and emotional stresses that have hindered those that have had economic challenges.
Our mission is simple! Gift skills and knowledge to our successors to change the landscape. While serving and servicing a captivated audience. Making a generation of problem solvers, entrepreneurs and instilling confidence.

Name: Instituto Ale Alves
Description:
O Instituto Ale Alves nasceu com a missão de transformar vidas por meio da beleza e da educação. Fundado por Alessandra Alves, o instituto se dedica a oferecer serviços de beleza de alta qualidade e a formar novos profissionais prontos para brilhar no mercado. Com uma abordagem que valoriza o cuidado personalizado e a excelência técnica, o instituto oferece procedimentos como: embelezamento do olhar, cuidados com as unhas, cabelo e maquiagem, sempre alinhados com as mais modernas tendências do setor.
Mais do que um espaço de beleza, o Instituto Ale Alves é também um centro de formação técnica. Com cursos focados em áreas como: auto maquiagem, lash designer  e nail designer, o instituto prepara seus alunos para se destacarem como profissionais altamente capacitados, prontos para transformar o mercado de beleza. A missão de educar vai além da técnica: o instituto busca elevar a autoestima, promover o bem-estar e capacitar indivíduos para uma trajetória de sucesso e realização.
Com uma equipe de especialistas, infraestrutura moderna e uma visão inovadora, o Instituto Ale Alves se posiciona como um espaço onde beleza e conhecimento se encontram, oferecendo resultados que impactam tanto no presente quanto no futuro de seus clientes e alunos.

A Barcelonában alapított ARUAL cég,- mint az egyik vezető vállalat Spanyolországban - fodrász- és kozmetikai szakemberek számára készült termékek gyártásával és forgalmazásával kezdte működését. Mára már a termékportfóliója nagy részét a hétköznapi emberek számára is hasznos, használható termékek teszik ki.


Alapvető értékünk mindig is ez volt és maradt a mai napig: A termék MINŐSÉGE. Ez a minőség sikerünk és piaci pozíciónk kulcsa. Ügyfeleink bizalma elsődleges számunkra, és ehhez egyszerűen elengedhetetlen a minőség állandósága.

Filozófiánk egy állandó „vállalkozói szellem”, amely minden nap azon dolgozik, hogy tájékozott legyen a fogyasztói igényekkel és a legújabb trendekkel kapcsolatban. Ennek érdekében kutatási, fejlesztési és innovációs csapatunk megállás nélkül dolgozik, hogy a piac által megkívánt tökéletes terméket hozzuk létre. Az innovációba való folyamatos befektetés alapvető fontosságú.

Name: Dermastil Kosmetik
Description:
2013 gründete ich, Emine Kocabiyik, das Dermastil Kosmetikstudio.

Als Inhaberin stehe ich stets im direkten Kontakt mit unseren Kunden und erwarte diese mit einem rundum Wohlfühlangebot.

Dieses reicht von kosmetischen Behandlungen über medizinischer Fußpflege und Haarentfernung mit IPL, Wachs, Fäden oder Lumenis Laser bis hin zu apparativen Treatments wie z.B.: Microdermabrasion, Wimpernverlängerung, Wimpernlifting und vielem mehr.

Die jahrelange Erfahrung spiegelt sich in unserer hauseigenen Marke wieder. Praxisnähe und hohe Qualität standen bei der Entwicklung im Vordergrund. Die Beliebtheit der Produkte Dermastil und Dermawax hat zu einem positiven Image der Marke geführt und das über die deutschen Grenzen hinaus. Da unsere Marke auch in anderen Kosmetikstudios zum Einsatz kommt, empfangen wir in regelmäßigen Abständen Kosmetiker und Kosmetikerinnen für Schulungen auf unsere Produkte.

Erhältlich sind diese bei uns im Studio oder auch online unter www.dermastil.de

Ich freue mich auf Ihren Besuch im Dermastil Kosmetikstudio!

Emine Kocabiyik
Emine Kocabiyik
Inhaberin

Description:
The Shed 52 was an independent barbershop that I founded and operated from 2019 to 2022 in Essex. Built on the principles of quality, community, and exceptional customer service, The Shed 52 quickly became a trusted destination for clients seeking precision grooming in a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere.

From classic cuts to modern styles, our team delivered bespoke barbering tailored to each client’s preferences. Beyond haircuts, The Shed 52 served as a hub for community connection, fostering genuine relationships and repeat visits from loyal clients.

As both owner and operator, I managed every aspect of the business; from day-to-day operations and marketing to building the brand and ensuring a high standard of service. This experience honed my skills in leadership, customer service, and entrepreneurship, which I now carry into future ventures.

The Shed 52 may have closed its doors, but its legacy of quality and community-focused service continues to shape my professional journey.

Name: Redefined Co. | Aesthetics Academy | Salon & Spas
Description:
Mission Statement
*********************
Redefined.Co Indigenous Aesthetics Academy thrives to provide post-secondary education for Indigenous students to improve their overall quality of life. Redefined.Co provides holistic approaches during theory, and practical approaches within its courses. Unlike most colleges, we offer on-site counseling from our Indigenous counselor and seek to understand individual needs to achieve longevity of students' success. Redefined.Co works alongside students, and bands to provide educational accommodations to break systematic barriers that may often be prominent in Westernized educational systems. As an Indigenous business, we provide mentorship, business management skills, financial literacy, ongoing community support, and assistance with job placement.

Who We Are
*************
Redefined Co has found growing success bringing aesthetic trade certificate training to remote indigenous communities in Saskatchewan. We break the barriers indigenous
people face in acquiring post-secondary education to pursue jobs in the beauty/aesthetic market. Our business has created an indigenously owned and operated First Nations aesthetic college that has launched on reserve.

Name: Supreme Shave Barber & Beard Emporium
Description:
Al Gonzales has over 30 years experience in men's grooming, shaving, hair cutting, styling and shaving skin care. He holds a Class A Barber License and is a certified Master Barber.

Gonzales' distinguished career began in 1980 at Town & Country Memorial in Houston, Texas (now known as City Center). In 1987 his quest for the ultimate shave led him to the Dallas/Fort Worth metroplex the grooming capital of Texas. For 20-years he honed, polished and perfected his skills to create truly, the ultimate shave.

Always looking to the future, Gonzales left Main Street Barber Shop in historic Grapevine Texas for the boom of Houston's fastest growing communities Missouri City and Sugar Land. Gonzales moved his wife Dora and sons Aidan and Gianmarco to this thriving area to open his own business and share the ultimate shave experience with you.

Al's impeccable taste and passion for the industry is felt throughout Supreme Shave & Barber Emporium. From the lush, antique barber's chairs to the flat screen television from the vintage decor adorning the walls (including a picture of long-time client Spanky from famed 'Our Gang') to the fine scotch or cigars available Al will make your experience supreme in every way.

Name: Léavie
Description:
Haarverlängerung bedeutet bei Léavie Herzensangelegenheit.

Hi, ich bin Lea, gelernte Extensions Expertin.
Haarverlängerungen waren schon immer meine große Leidenschaft.
Da ich selbst schon früh unter starkem Haarausfall litt, weiß ich ganz genau, was für ein neues Lebensgefühl dir mit einer Haarverlängerung zurück gegeben werden kann.
Jede Kundin wird von mir individuell beraten, bis wir die perfekte Lösung für deinen Haartraum gefunden haben.
In Themen wie Farben, Länge und Methoden bietet Léavie jahrelange Erfahrung
und arbeitet ausschließlich mit qualitativ hochwertigen Haaren.

Gerne beraten ich dich in einem persönlichem Beratungsgespräch und geben dir alles,
was für den richtigen Umgang mit einer Haarverlängerung wichtig ist, mit an die Hand.
Zusammen suchen wir dann die passende Methode, Farbe und Länge für dich aus. 

Neben den Haarverlängerungen, biete ich ebenfalls Behandlungen für Wimpern und Augenbrauen. 

Ich freue mich auf dich und bis bald!
Lea

Der petracell Kosmetik Zellextrakt enthält Frischzellen sowie eine Vielzahl von Peptiden, Zytokinen und Wachstumsfaktoren. Neben Frischzellen werden besonders Peptide, auf Grund ihrer Eigenschaft schnell von äußeren Hautschichten aufgenommen zu werden, wirksam. Bei der Herstellung wird weitgehend auf Chemikalien oder Lösungsmittel verzichtet. Spürbar wird der reine Zellextrakt in seiner natürlichen Zusammensetzung.

Specialty Beauty services and Beauty Restorative services.

Breast cancer is a harmful and draining condition that can cause its victims to struggle with their sense of self-esteem following recovery. After undergoing a mastectomy and breast reconstruction, the new breast(s) will essentially be a 'blank canvas' that no longer includes a nipple and areola. Lizeth has helped many women with recreating real lifelike tattoos. Epic Beauty Rx will create excellent illusions of natural breasts, leaving breast cancer survivors feeling like their old selves again. This is also performed for patients who have had complications while undergoing reconstructive surgery, such as noticeable skin discoloration or lost nipples/areolas. Lizeth provides precise color matching that restores the natural, desired appearance beautifully. Epic Beauty Rx Specialized Technique of real looking 3D Nipple Tattoos are helping women feel whole again and restored.

Name: Fox Tox
Description:
FOXTOX is a transdermal skincare serum developed to support and complement cosmetic injectables for neurotoxins. Formulated with ingredients clinically studied for skin health and post-treatment care—like zinc, hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, glycerin, and 20 PPM silver—FOXTOX is designed to fit seamlessly into your daily skincare routine while supporting longer-lasting confidence.

Our formula focuses on transdermal absorption, delivering active ingredients directly to targeted areas to help maintain smooth, hydrated, and refreshed skin between aesthetic appointments.

Whether you're a provider or a client, FOXTOX offers a science-backed solution to enhance the post-injection experience—without disrupting your skincare routine.

Name: LE Micropigmentación
Description:
Luz Estela Franco Skin & PMU es un centro especializado en micropigmentación avanzada y tratamientos de cuidado de la piel, ofreciendo soluciones estéticas personalizadas que resaltan la belleza natural de cada persona. Ubicados en Cartagena de indias, Colombia y Nueva York, nos destacamos por fusionar arte y tecnología, brindando resultados impecables que generan confianza y satisfacción en nuestros clientes.

Nuestra fundadora, Luz Estela Franco, cuenta con años de experiencia en el mundo de la estética y la micropigmentación, combinando técnicas innovadoras con un enfoque artístico que asegura resultados duraderos y naturales. Nos especializamos en servicios de micropigmentación de cejas, labios, y delineado de ojos, así como tratamientos avanzados de cuidado facial para mantener la piel radiante y saludable.

En Luz Estela Franco Skin & PMU, entendemos que cada cliente es único, por lo que nuestros tratamientos son completamente personalizados, ajustándose a las necesidades y características individuales de cada persona. Nuestra misión es empoderar a nuestros clientes, ayudándolos a sentirse seguros y bellos, a través de técnicas que destacan su verdadera belleza.

Nuestros servicios incluyen:

Micropigmentación de cejas: Nano Brows, Ombré, Fusion Brows
Micropigmentación de labios: Lip Blushing y corrección de tono
Delineado de ojos permanente: Eyeliner, Lashliner
Tratamientos faciales avanzados para mantener una piel saludable
Cursos de Permanent Make Up

Nuestro compromiso con la excelencia y la innovación nos posiciona como líderes en la industria de la micropigmentación. Si buscas realzar tu belleza de manera natural y duradera, te invitamos a agendar una cita y descubrir cómo podemos ayudarte.

Descubre más sobre nosotros y nuestros servicios exclusivos en nuestra web o visítanos en nuestras redes sociales.

Name: Nuuri Braids n Co
Description:
At Nuuri Braids n Co, we specialize in creating lightweight, natural-looking braids that blend beauty and comfort seamlessly. Our signature boho braids deliver a full, voluminous look without overloading your natural hair with excessive synthetic extensions.
Unlike other brands recommending 4-5 packs of extensions, we achieve exceptional results using just 1-1.5 packs of our premium boho extensions. This approach ensures your braids are stylish, long-lasting, and healthier for your hair and scalp. Overusing synthetic extensions can cause unnecessary stress and even disrupt sleep—an often-overlooked issue in the haircare industry.
Through our proprietary techniques, we deliver lightweight braids that look and feel amazing, making it easier to maintain your style while staying comfortable day and night. We aim to redefine the braiding experience by addressing common challenges like discomfort, heaviness, and waste, all while enhancing the quality and longevity of your hairstyle.
As a specialist braiding service, we are dedicated to continuous improvement. Our vision includes building a team of highly-trained professionals who share our commitment to innovation and excellence, ensuring every client enjoys the same superior experience.
Choose Nuuri for braids that prioritize your comfort, style, and hair health. Let us transform the way you experience braided styles.

Name: Biobirun by Maraval Cosmetics
Description:
Te damos la bienvenida a la empresa Maraval Cosmetics S.A.S. BIC  e invitamos a descubrir Biobirun, una línea de productos dedicada al cuidado de cabellos afro-rizados. Nuestra empresa ha florecido en el corazón del Pacífico sur de Colombia, en la Perla del Pacífico, San Andrés de Tumaco. 

Nos especializamos con pasión en la fabricación, comercialización y distribución de productos cosméticos meticulosamente diseñados para cabellos afro-rizados. En el corazón de cada producto está la manifestación de los saberes de comunidades étnicas del Pacífico colombiano, reflejados en la utilización de ingredientes naturales que han sido parte integral de las rutinas de cuidado capilar de generación en generación. Aquí, en Maraval Cosmetics, creemos que el cabello afro-rizado no es simplemente una expresión física, sino un símbolo poderoso de resiliencia y empoderamiento.

Un modelo de negocio inclusivo: en nuestra cadena de suministro vinculamos productores del Pacífico nariñense en el suroccidente colombiano, y en la comercialización trabajamos con madres cabeza de familia y madres cuidadoras; creando oportunidades de empleo y aportando al desarrollo económico local.

Nuestro compromiso ambiental: Estamos comprometidos con la naturaleza y nuestra comunidad, participando en acciones dedicadas al cuidado del medio ambiente, especialmente la reutilización de residuos sólidos.

Name: Anita Brows Beauty
Description:
#1 Beauty Studio, located in the heart of Lekki Phase 1, Lagos, Nigeria. 

With over a decade of experience under our belt, We have built an award-winning brand that also opens opportunities for young Nigerians to gain employment and expertise. We are highly sought after worldwide and internationally recognised for our unique skills.

Over the years, the brand has featured and liaised with the founder of International Brand, “Iman Cosmetics”, “Maybelline”, and worked with numerous public figures across the globe. In 2016, we brought home the Abryanz Fashion Style Award from Uganda as “Makeup Artist of the Year, West Africa”. Our founder, Anita-Adetola Adetoye also won The Future Awards 2018 “Prize for Beauty” and well as "Forbes 30Under30 Africa". We have run several sold-out classes across the globe the United Kingdom to Ghana and many more locations. 
The vision for Anita Brows Beauty is to “Empower, Educate and Equip”. 

Asides making women the most beautiful version of their beautiful selves, we have pioneered several educative programs. One that we are most proud of is “The Live Demo Series”. The Live Demo Series was birthed out of a desire to equip and impact others. We believe everyone should have something doing with their hands. Our team developed a way to make the education of beauty accessible to all, for an affordable cost. In each series, we focus on a specific subject. So far, the Live Demo Series has been a huge success, with each series selling out in less than 24 hours. We have had testimonials of how life-changing and impactful it has been. 

We were contracted to train over 1000 students from various universities across Lagos, in partnership with GTBank, giving them practical tools to generate wealth. This was a tremendous success!

We have championed other beauty businesses under our umbrella; Hair Essence Salon, AB Skincare store and we have so much more underway.

We are much more than just a beauty service company, we are change makers.

Das professionelle und stets aktuell geschulte Team besteht aus Kosmetikerinnen mit langjähriger Erfahrung und höchstem Know-how. Ob Gesichtsbehandlungen, Wimpernverlängerung, dauerhafte Haarentfernung oder Wellness-Behandlungen – bei Blank Cosmetic sind Sie in den besten Händen.

Name: Estética Lenss
Description:
Estética Lenss - O Seu Refúgio de Beleza e Bem-Estar

Bem-vindo a Estética Lenss, onde a excelência se encontra com a estética! Nós somos mais do que um salão de beleza - somos dedicados a proporcionar uma experiência única, onde cada cliente é tratado com atenção personalizada, carinho e respeito.

Nosso Compromisso: Atendimento de Qualidade ao Cliente

No coração do nosso negócio está o compromisso inabalável com o atendimento de qualidade. Nossa equipe altamente qualificada não apenas possui habilidades excepcionais, mas também está aqui para ouvir suas necessidades e desejos. Queremos criar um ambiente acolhedor, onde você se sinta não apenas um cliente, mas parte da nossa comunidade.

Beleza que Transforma

Na Lenss, acreditamos que a beleza é uma expressão única de cada indivíduo. Nossos serviços não se limitam apenas a tratamentos estéticos; eles são uma jornada para descobrir e realçar a sua beleza interior e exterior. Utilizamos produtos de alta qualidade e técnicas inovadoras para garantir resultados impressionantes, seja para um tratamento facial relaxante, um corte de cabelo moderno ou uma sessão de spa revigorante.

Responsabilidade Ambiental e Social

Além de proporcionar serviços de beleza excepcionais, assumimos a responsabilidade de cuidar do nosso planeta e comunidade. Adotamos práticas sustentáveis em nossas operações para minimizar nosso impacto ambiental. Também nos envolvemos em iniciativas sociais locais, pois acreditamos que a beleza vai além dos padrões estéticos e se estende à construção de uma comunidade mais forte e unida.

Venha fazer parte da experiência Lenss, onde a qualidade, a beleza e a responsabilidade se encontram para criar momentos inesquecíveis. Estamos ansiosos para recebê-lo e tornar cada visita uma celebração da sua singularidade e estilo!

Name: Face it Almere
Description:
Face It Almere biedt de meest professionele en betrouwbare Botox, Hyaluronzuur en Profhilo behandelingen aan van Flevoland. Bij Face It Almere bent u verzekerd van de beste cosmetische behandeling van Almere. Cosmetisch Arts Peter Driessen is KNMG erkend cosmetisch arts.

Peter Driessen behaalde zijn artsendiploma aan de V.U te Amsterdam.

Tijdens zijn artsenstudie kwam hij er al achter dat het werken in een ziekenhuis niet zijn weg was.
Werken als huisarts trok hem wel aan maar ook daar zag hij dat in de praktijk te weinig aandacht en tijd voor de patiënt mogelijk was.

Daarom heeft hij zich na zijn artsenstudie gespecialiseerd in de aanvullende geneeswijzen zoals: acupunctuur, neuraaltherapie en orthomoleculaire geneeskunde. Al geruime tijd heeft Peter Driessen zich volledig gespecialiseerd in cosmetische behandelingen. Behandelingen zoals acupunctuur biedt hij dan ook niet meer aan.

Vanaf 2001 heeft hij zich ook gespecialiseerd als cosmetisch arts en sindsdien heeft hij meer dan 30.000 behandelingen verricht.

Er wordt steeds de grootste zorgvuldigheid in acht genomen met betrekking tot veilig en steriel werken. Vooraf – en tijdens de behandeling wordt er steeds met U overleg gepleegd, zodat er een medisch verantwoord resultaat wordt behaald. En er geen verrassingen zijn over de kosten. Er wordt rekening gehouden met het huidtype, soort rimpel/huiddefect en de wensen en budget van de cliënt.

Empowering the Next Generation of Beauty Professionals

Founded in 2011 and proudly female-owned, Allgood Beauty Institute is a premier destination for hands-on beauty education. We believe beauty is more than skin deep — it’s a craft, a calling, and a pathway to empowerment.

Our mission is to turn passionate individuals into confident, licensed professionals ready to thrive in the beauty industry. Whether you’re focused on esthetics, cosmetology, or other beauty disciplines, our programs blend artistry with modern industry standards — all in a supportive, inclusive environment.

What Sets Us Apart:

* Female-owned and operated since 2011
* Small class sizes for personalized instruction
* State-of-the-art training facilities
* Real salon-floor experience with actual clients
* A strong culture of mentorship and career guidance
* Business and branding support for aspiring entrepreneurs

At Allgood Beauty Institute, we’re more than a school — we’re a community that believes in excellence, professionalism, and the transformative power of beauty.

Name: Twists & Locs Salon
Description:
Inspired by the rich heritage of Ghanaian hair styling as well as the global trends in Natural hair care we opened our doors in 2009 to serve as a mecca of natural hair care in Ghana. We have focused on learning, sharing and developing the natural hair community and knowledge of natural hair care in Ghana. 

We believe our African hair is beautiful as it is can should be nurtured to it's full potential. We strive to use ingredients, products and processes that are not harmful to black African hair. We sample and review every product we stock and use only use what we are comfortable with. We listen to our clients and customize the salon experience to suit varying hair types, varying needs and the different desires of clients. 

We provide braids, twists, loc retwisting, coloring, styling and barbering etc. In our efforts to cater fully to our clients we have three locations ( Osu, East legon and East Airport). We also offer natural spa services.

Hair represents many things to many people, we respect it and offer our services to help you keep your natural hair beautiful.

Name: Villa Aesthetica
Description:
Ich bin Pia Sanker und zertifizierte Kosmetikerin, Nageldesignerin und Fußpflegerin.

Nach meiner Zertifizierung zur Nageldesignerin habe ich 2014 mein erstes Homestudio aufgebaut. Seit Oktober 2018 gab es Pias Nagelstudio in der Lenneper Altstadt. Im Juni 2021 habe ich die Villa Aesthetica eröffnet und biete seither neben dem Nageldesign auch Kosmetik Behandlungen, kosmetische und medizinische Fußpflege in meinem Studio an. Ich freue mich ein tolles Gesamtpaket in der Villa Aesthetica in Remscheid Lennep anbieten zu können.

Freut euch auf einen liebevoll, authentisch eingerichteten Kosmetik Salon, einen leckeren Kaffee und ein nettes Pläuschchen und lasst euch von mehr als 650 unterschiedliche Farben und einer Vielzahl toller Produkte von Biodroga begeistern oder bei einer entspannenden Fußpflege verwöhnen.

Beim Nageldesign verarbeite ich die Produkte von Revel – einem US-amerkikanischen Hersteller von Dipping Pulvern.
Bei der Behandlung wird der Nagel in ein feines Pulver getaucht. Dies ermöglicht einen besonders dünnen und dennoch stabilen und flexiblen Nagelaufbau. Das Dip System benötigt keine UV-Behandlung.
Dem kreativen Spielraum sind dabei quasi keine Grenzen gesetzt. Ob Full-Cover, French, Farbverläufe oder Babyboomer – nahezu jeder Kundenwunsch kann mit dem Dipping-Verfahren erfüllt werden.

Die Verarbeitungszeit und damit dein Aufenthalt im Studio wird um ca. die Hälfte, im Vergleich zu Pulver Flüssigkeit und Gel-Modellagen, verkürzt – mehr Zeit für Euch.

Als Pionier in der Verarbeitung von Dip Systemen habe ich mich 2016 dazu entschieden Schulungen für dieses System anzubieten. Häufig falsche Anwendung von vermeintlich professionellen Nageldesignern haben es dem wirklich tollen Produkt auf dem deutschen Markt bisher schwer gemacht. Meine Schulungen wenden sich an bereits erfahrene Nageldesigner – wir arbeiten live mit dem Dipping System und gehen auf Fehlerquellen in der Verarbeitung ein.

Name: Deandra Loves Beauty
Description:
Deandra's journey in the beauty industry is a
testament to her unwavering dedication and
exceptional talent. Hailing from the Blackfoot
Confederacy as a proud tribal member of Kainai
and Siksika, she earned her cosmetology license
from the prestigious Avalon Board of Cosmetology
in Arizona. With over a decade of experience in the
hairstyling industry. Deandra began their illustrious
career behind the chair at a luxury salon in
Scottsdale Arizona. Deandra's commitment to
excellence was evident as she received education
from master stylists, clinched victories in numerous
in-salon competitions, and secured a top 10 spot in
the country for her textured category in the
License to Create awards—an accolade making her
the first indigenous woman to win. Her artistic
prowess extends beyond the salon, with her work
gracing the pages of esteemed beauty platforms
such as Beauty Launchpad, Hairstylist Tribe, and Master of Braids.
Transitioning to the film industry, Deandra has demonstrated her
versatility and leadership as the Head of the hair department on award
winning films like The Coroner, Slash/Back, Acting Good S1, Warrior
Strong, and Nesting, earning praise and honorable accreditation.
Deandra's influence extends to the world of fashion and advertising,
where she has lent her expertise to trailblazing campaigns for Sephora,
Canada Goose, and the Toronto Raptors Community In Focus, as a result
her work has been showcased on billboards and Toronto transit for these
campaign shoots. Notably, she holds an ongoing creative hairstylist role
for the Indigenous Fashion Arts runway show also she became the first
indigenous hairstylist to hold a key hair position for Fashion Arts Toronto
2023. Her creative prowess has even caught the attention of global giants,
with The Lab NYFW inviting her to contribute to the mainstream Paris
Fashion Week in 2024. Through her transformative career, Deandra has
emerged as one of the top hairstylists to watch.

 Innovatief.

Name: Studio M.
Description:
At Studio M Basel, beauty becomes effortless and always personal.

Founded by Miriam Willrich, a trusted expert with over 20 years of experience in professional beauty and aesthetics, the studio was built for people who lead demanding lives and expect excellence with minimal effort.

From five-star Leading Hotels of the World to running her own successful salon with a full team of specialists, Miriam has seen what truly matters: efficiency, trust, and discretion.
Busy professionals don’t want to explain — they want to be understood.

That insight inspired the MWM-Method, a time-optimized, full-service beauty routine designed to keep clients looking polished and feeling confident, without needing to think about it.

In just two hours, everything is taken care of: Brows, quick hair removal, callus care, manicure and pedicure touch-ups, resurfacing and skincare.
Your home routine? Just shower.

For those moments when life feels heavy, Recover Sessions (30 minutes) provide a quick reset — balancing skin, energy, and mind.
For those seeking visible results without injectables, our Laser Lifting provides a natural alternative to Botox — lifting, firming, calming redness and restoring tone while keeping your expression authentically yours.

Today, Studio M Basel works exclusively with a select number of clients who appreciate privacy, precision, and results that quietly speak for themselves.

A timeless approach to beauty, for people who simply expect the best.

Name: MAKE ME UP Studio and School
Description: MAKE ME UP Studio and School – це школа та студія макіяжу в Одесі, яка протягом 9-ти років показує неймовірні успіхи в індустрії краси. Тут можна отримати одну з найбільш цікавих та красивих професій – візажист або пізнати секрети та таємниці бездоганного макіяжу для себе. Навчання в школі MAKE ME UP Studio and School відрізняється дуже ретельним підходом та уважним ставленням до кожного учня. За 9 рокiв було випущено більше 400 професійних візажистів, понад 500 дівчат та жінок відкрили нові образи для себе, пройшовши навчання «Сам собі візажист». У нашої школи макіяжу блискучі відгуки, і ми пишаємося цим. Крім основних курсів макіяжу, є курси підвищення кваліфікації, курс «Fashion-глянець», курс навчання аеромакіяжу (макіяжу аерографом), а також курс "Основи гриму", періодично проходять майстер-класи та тренінги, причому не тільки в Одесі, а й в інших містах та країнах. Отже, чому слід задуматися про навчання саме в школі та студії макіяжу MAKE ME UP Studio and School? Тому, що за плечима команди викладачів великий професійний досвід, участь у численних fashion заходах, реалізація багатьох успішних проектів і співпраця із зірковими брендами.Плануєте освоїти нову професію та стати справжнім професіоналом? Ласкаво просимо до команди Make Me Up Studio and School, яка дає, мабуть, найсильніші знання в Одесі, багато корисної практики і занурює в приємну атмосферу.

Každý produkt značky je asociován s určitou afirmací, což pomáhá posílit pozitivní vnímání sebe sama při používání. Zajímavostí také je, že skleněné a papírové obaly pochází z ČR.

Name: KandakaNaturals
Description:
Who We Are – Kandaka Naturals

Kandaka Naturals is a women-empowering social enterprise based in Rwanda, creating high-quality natural skincare and hygiene products for health-conscious People. We blend sustainability, wellness, and beauty—offering our customers low-waste, plant-based solutions that nourish both skin and soul.

Our products are more than skincare: they are a pathway to self-love, confidence, and holistic well-being, helping our clients feel beautiful inside and out—while actively contributing to a greener planet and a fairer society.

We reinvest 20% of our earnings into fighting period poverty through our project safe2bleed. Through Menstrual Hygiene Management workshops and the distribution of reusable pads and dignity kits, we empower girls and women across Rwanda and Sudan. In the coming years, we will expand our impact by launching a "1,000 Days Line"—special hygiene products for new mothers, including postpartum pads, breast pads, and period panties.

Every product you buy from us helps build a world where women thrive.

Good for you. Good for the planet. Good for the people.

Name: May Salon Inc.
Description:
МАЙ HairSPA - салон красоты премиум-класса, основанный на уникальной идее совмещения услуг салона красоты и SPA-услуг. МАЙ HairSPA - это совершенно новый подход к оказанию услуг, где основное внимание отведено уходу за волосами высшего качества, благодаря использованию лучших косметических брендов и профессионализму мастеров. Это не только стрижка, окраска волос или создание имиджа - это новая философия, эстетика для волос, подчиненная самым последним веяниям нашего времени.

Салон подарит Вам чувственный и естественный SPA-уход, доступный в повседневной жизни!

По итогам работы в 2009 признан руководством Компании «МАЙ» лучшим салоном в номинации «Жемчужина в сфере красоты» за лучший сервис и великолепное обслуживание своих клиентов.

14 апреля 2010 года состоялась церемония вручения Первой Международной Премии в области красоты и здоровья «Грация». Салон красоты «МАЙ HairSPA» стал победителем в номинации «Лучший салон красоты LUXE».

В декабре 2021 салон переехал в соседнее обновленное помещение.  И для Вас мы расширили спектр предлагаемых услуг и теперь Вы можете побаловать себя процедурами у массажистов, а так же позаботиться о своей красоте в кабинетах медицинской и лазерной косметологии!

Name: EXO NAD
Description:
EXO NAD+
Advanced Exosome Solution for Microneedling & Aesthetic Clinics
EXO NAD+ is a professional all-in-one skin rejuvenation solution developed and manufactured in South Korea for clinics, dermatologists, and aesthetic providers seeking premium microneedling and RF-microneedling outcomes.
Microneedling creates controlled micro-channels in the skin. When combined with EXO NAD+, the treatment goes beyond mechanical stimulation—supporting cell-level regeneration, faster recovery, and improved skin quality.

Why Clinics Choose EXO NAD+
• Enhances post-microneedling recovery
• Improves skin texture, elasticity, and hydration
• Supports collagen stimulation and dermal density
• Helps reduce downtime and inflammation
• Enables premium treatment positioning and higher per-session value

Advanced Multi-Active Formula

EXO NAD+ combines:
• High-concentration exosomes (over 13 billion/ml, ultra-nano size)
• NAD⁺ for cellular energy and skin vitality
• PDRN & PN for tissue repair and regeneration
• Collagen & Glutathione for structure and antioxidant support
• 8 high-purity peptides for anti-aging and skin renewal

Designed for:
 Microneedling
 RF-Microneedling
 Post-laser recovery
 Advanced skin rejuvenation protocols

For Distributors & Suppliers

EXO NAD+ is an ideal high-value consumable for:
• Beauty product distributors
• Microneedling & device suppliers
• Medical aesthetic wholesalers

Clinics globally position exosome-enhanced microneedling as a premium add-on, creating strong repeat demand.
